Description:
Innovapptive is an AI-powered, Mobile-First Connected Worker Platform built for the Office of the COO to drive measurable improvements in safety, reliability, productivity, and cost across asset-intensive industries.

Trusted by 50+ global enterprises, including Indorama, W.R.Grace, Westlake Chemicals, Shell, Hess, Par Pacific, Dominion Energy, Newmont Mining, Kimberly Clark, Airgas, AkzoNobel, UNICEF, and others, Innovapptive helps organizations modernize how frontline work is planned, executed, and governed, at scale.

At its core, Innovapptive unifies Predictions/Sensing, Operations, Maintenance, EHS and Supply Chain teams on a single, patented AI Powered low-code/no-code platform. Frontline workers are equipped with configurable, mobile-first applications for operator rounds, shift handovers, planning, scheduling, work execution, inspections, permits, safety checklists, digital work instructions, and inventory management. Back-office teams gain real-time visibility, intelligent planning, and execution control through integrated planning, scheduling, and analytics.

Unlike traditional point solutions that fragment execution, Innovapptive eliminates silos by connecting work identification, execution, capture, and inventory flows end-to-end. Built-in AI, machine learning, and natural language capabilities reduce decision and action latency by delivering predictive insights and recommendations directly into frontline workflows.

Enterprises no longer have to choose between field data capture tools and mobile EAM or inventory solutions. Innovapptive uniquely delivers the best of both—on one unified platform, enabling faster execution, higher compliance, improved collaboration, reduced downtime, and sustainable cost takeout.

Innovapptive powers modern operations, where execution drives value.

Empower is a software company that is disrupting the rideshare industry, not by providing transportation, but by providing software that puts transportation decisions back into the hands of drivers and riders.

Name: TRIBBU
Description:
Nos dijeron que no había alternativa. 

Que moverse era eso: atascos, horarios imposibles, sueldos que se van en gasolina, coches vacíos y ciudades colapsadas. Que compartir era complicado. Inviable. Que no funcionaba.

No lo aceptamos. Miramos los datos sobre el tráfico, tan absurdos que son difíciles de creer, y dijimos: basta. Moverse no debería costar tanto. Ni dinero. Ni tiempo. Ni salud mental. Ir a clase o al trabajo no puede ser una carrera de obstáculos.

Moverse solos no puede ser la única opción.

Llevamos 6 años dejándonos la piel por otra movilidad posible. Una más lógica, humana y eficiente. Se llama carpooling.

Ahora las instituciones respaldan el cambio que llevamos tanto activando: somos la plataforma de conexión que lidera el movimiento de la movilidad compartida. Hemos recorrido ese camino. We’ve done the work.

Y no vamos solos. 

Nos acompaña una red de aliados. Juntos ya hemos hecho cientos de miles de trayectos compartidos.

Somos una tribu en movimiento.

Ahora compartir coche es tan fácil como coger un autobús. Pronto será igual de habitual. Compartir tiene sentido. Es económico. Ecológico. Funcional. Pero cada trayecto es mucho más: conocer personas, compartir historias, cambiarte el día. A veces, incluso la vida.

Compartir no es una promesa: es un sistema que funciona. Cuando lo que haces te soluciona y lo disfrutas se convierte en un hábito que transforma el sistema. Desde Madrid, Barcelona y otras muchas ciudades y zonas industriales. Esto no es solo para unos pocos. Es para todos. Solo nos vale si es masivo. Si cambia el mundo.

Cada trayecto compartido es una decisión con impacto. Cada asiento lleno, una forma de transformación. No venimos a imaginar un futuro.

Venimos a movernos hacia él, juntos.

Name: Ribon
Description:
Ribon is the only employee giving platform built specifically for nonprofit healthcare systems.

We help hospitals launch high-performing donation programs that staff actually want to be part of—driving record participation, building a stronger culture, and raising new funds without ever asking employees for money.

Traditional employee giving programs don’t fit the healthcare reality—because they weren’t built for it.

They were built for office workers, not for nurses finishing long shifts or janitorial staff who never sit at a desk. The result? Low engagement, limited impact, participation rates that rarely surpass 10%, and a missed opportunity to activate one of the most mission-driven workforces in the world.

Ribon changes that.

At the core of our approach is our proprietary Reverse Matching Gift technology, used by hundreds of thousands of donors and recognized by the Gates Foundation as one of the 10 most innovative giving technologies in the world.

Instead of employees giving their own money, they receive tickets—funded by your institution’s unrestricted grants—which they use to support internal projects defined at the start of the campaign. The experience is mobile-first, intuitive, and designed to make giving easy, spontaneous, and rewarding.

The result? Participation often surpasses 50%, with programs up and running in just a few weeks. Leaders can track engagement, identify gaps, and use built-in tools to bring more people in—without running complex campaigns or asking staff for donations.

Healthcare teams already give their time, energy, and hearts every day. Ribon helps them give financially—spontaneously and proudly—without pressure.

Name: Decision Mentor
Description:
Decision Mentor is a Multi-Criteria Decision Analysis (MCDA) app, Powered by AI, based on the theory of Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP). The app is designed to simplify complex decisions for individuals facing real-life problems, in their personal or professional decision problem with multiple conflicting objectives.

The App is highly simplified form to bring value of AHP based MCDA tool to individuals, otherwise been available only via corporate subscriptions !

Our criteria-based process allows individuals to identify Criteria and Options (supported by AI).  One can prioritize their criteria, and compare  options / choices side-by-side with each criteria to come out with options ranking.

One can visualize outcome by changing initial criteria weight generated by own judgments / tradeoff. 

The App provides framework to reduce decision anxiety, get more insights and help individuals as well as teams / organisations make a decision backed by science and intelligence with evidence.

With Decision Mentor app, individuals can learn from others’ decisions from our public decision feed and get support during the research phase through AI.

The app’s objective is to provide users with a decision-making compass to help them navigate their way to choose an informed decision possible.

The users of the app no longer have to worry about ethical dilemmas in choosing available shortlisted few options as Decision Mentor is a theory supported individual/personal/private decision support system (DSS).

This app is developed by Truenary Solutions in association with Development Dynamics.

Ils peuvent également faire leurs pronostics, rythmés par un countdown jusqu’au coup d’envoi, et interagir via des jeux sur les réseaux sociaux du club.

En fin de rencontre, Kolizeo installe de nouveaux rituels fans avec le vote MVP et des reveals spectaculaires sur écrans géants.

Après le match, l’expérience se prolonge sur les réseaux sociaux avec les résultats, les pronostics et le teasing du prochain événement.

Une expérience qui fidélise naturellement :
À chaque activation, en ville, au stade ou en ligne, les supporters gagnent des points qui s’accumulent tout au long de la saison et sont échangeables dans une boutique virtuelle contre des expériences, des avantages exclusifs ou des récompenses.

Pour les marques et partenaires, Kolizeo ouvre la voie à un sponsoring 2.0 :
une présence intégrée à l’expérience, utile, mesurable et engageante, qui génère du trafic réel, de l’interaction et des données qualifiées, bien au-delà de la simple visibilité.

Name: Ping Caria
Description:
Hi, I’m Caria — the WhatsApp of recruiting.
No job boards, no endless applications, no overpriced agencies. Just a real conversation that leads to real opportunities.

Here’s how it works: you message me on WhatsApp and tell me about your background, your goals, and what you’re looking for. I’ll ask for a few quick details — your name, email, and LinkedIn — and then I’ll give you a short five-minute call. I want to know your story, what excites you in your work, and what you’d like to avoid in your next role.

From there, I do the heavy lifting. I reach out directly to recruiters, hiring managers, and founders who are a match. If they say yes, I introduce you instantly by email with both of you copied. You get up to three tailored introductions every day for free, and if you want unlimited intros, it’s just €20 per month.

For companies, I work like a headhunter: sourcing, pre-qualifying, checking references, and even helping with negotiation. The model is simple and risk-free: 5% of the annual gross salary if you hire, or 8% with a three-month replacement guarantee. No subscriptions, no upfront costs — you only pay on success.

Every “yes” means a live intro. Every “no” is the start of a long-term relationship, because I follow up regularly. I’m not a bot or a job board. I’m a digital recruiter who speaks like a human consultant, available 24/7 to make hiring faster, smarter, and success-only.

EFT POS ve Ödeme Kaydedici Cihazlar (ÖKC) alanında; kurulum, yedek parça temini, versiyon güncelleme, uygulama yükleme, arıza onarımı, cihaz değişimi, bakım, eğitim, geçici kapatma ve cihaz geri alımı gibi çok sayıda hizmeti tek çatı altında sunmaktadır.

Türkiye genelinde 10’dan fazla ilde yerinde servis hizmeti veren Payser, tüm illerdeki müşterilerine de deneyim merkezi üzerinden uzaktan destek sağlamaktadır.

Yenilikçi yaklaşımı, hızlı büyüme performansı, güçlü operasyonel yapısı ve teknoloji odaklı hizmet modeliyle Payser, ödeme sistemleri sektöründe geleceğin servis standartlarını şekillendiren öncü iş ortaklarından biridir.

EN

Payser, a company of Axela Group, is a service provider specializing in technical field service for POS terminals, offering comprehensive end-to-end solutions ranging from installation to repair.

In the field of EFT POS and Payment Recording Devices (ÖKC), it provides a wide range of services under one roof, including installation, spare parts supply, version updates, application installation, repair, device replacement, maintenance, training, temporary shutdown, and device retrieval.

Payser provides on-site service in more than 10 provinces across Turkey and also offers remote support to customers in all provinces through its experience center.

With its innovative approach, rapid growth performance, strong operational structure, and technology-focused service model, Payser is one of the pioneering business partners shaping the future service standards in the payment systems sector.

Name: BettorTakes
Description:
Do you bet on sports? Are you trying to get an edge?

Instead of using the same data that everyone else has to make betting decisions, why not focus on information that is unique to you and what you good at? 

BettorTakes is the only App which searches your betting history to find your strengths & weaknesses.

Until you break down and examine your betting patterns, there is a lot driving your decisions that you might not be aware of such as, are you better at favorites or underdogs? Home or away? How do you do betting teams off of two straight wins? Do you have too much of a ‘recency bias’? 

BettorTakes gives you a unique insight into your own betting patterns and gives you information that can help you become a better bettor. Bet into your strengths and improve your weaknesses to become a well-rounded bettor.

At the center of BettorTakes is a predictive tool. Simply enter the bets you are considering making, and our algorithm will search your previous history to find similar situations. It distills many variables into an EDGE score, which represents your proficiency in the bet you are considering making. Use this information any way you would like, to increase, decrease, or not place the bet. 

BettorTakes also has exciting social features, such as contests! Compete against your friends to see who is the best bettor.

Download the app today to become a better bettor!

Name: Inspect AR
Description:
Inspect AR is a comprehensive, scalable AR platform for enterprises. It covers everything from training new employees to maintenance, inspections, service, and audits. Forget about pen and paper – from now on, you can rely on a digital inspection process powered by Augmented Reality!


Inspect AR Supports All Business Operations

Training & Onboarding
Training a new workforce in the Generation Z era comes with its own set of challenges for companies. Meanwhile, the retirement of experienced employees and their knowledge requires fresh and creative approaches for effective training programs.
With Inspect AR, we facilitate sharing and visualizing technical know-how directly on the job, at the plant, or the machine, making the learning process more efficient compared to any other method.

Inspections – Maintenance – Service
Imagine your employees navigating complex inspection and maintenance processes with ease and confidence, free from the need for extensive expert knowledge. With our software, this is no longer just a vision of the future; it’s a reality. Inspect AR empowers you to create step-by-step instructions with AR overlays and checklists via an intuitive user interface, accessible both in the web browser and on-site directly in the app or through smart glasses.

Quality Management – Audits – Safety
Often, thousands of inspections need to be conducted per week, accumulating to hundreds of thousands of checkpoints on tanks, centrifuges, valves, and other plant components annually. There’s no space left for human error during testing processes. Unfortunately, highly qualified personnel aren’t always available on-site.

Overview
Teleprompter is a cutting-edge mobile application designed to revolutionize the way content creators produce professional videos. With its intuitive, user-friendly interface, Teleprompter is your go-to solution for creating flawless content, whether you're a seasoned YouTuber, a corporate communicator, or someone stepping in front of the camera for the first time.

What We Do
Our app serves as your personal digital teleprompter, displaying your script while you record, ensuring you never miss a line or need a second take. It's like having a personal assistant right in your pocket, giving you the confidence to deliver your lines perfectly the first time, every time.

Core Features

-Multi-Device Compatibility: Use Teleprompter on any iOS device and control your scripts remotely via tablet, phone, computer, or smartwatch.
-High-Quality Recording: With 4K video support across all Apple devices.
-Customization: Edit your script on the fly, set your reading speed, and more.
-Offline Functionality: Teleprompter works without an internet connection for a seamless experience, wherever you are.

Why Choose Us?
-Trusted by 1M+ Creators: Over a million creators have recorded more than 17 million videos using our app.
-Highly Rated: With over 20K+ five-star reviews, our users love how Teleprompter has elevated the quality of their content.
-Robust Workflow Integration: Sync with Dropbox, add scripts from Word, iCloud, or Google Drive, and share scripts between devices.
-Anxiety-Free Recording: Our app helps you focus and reduces the anxiety associated with public speaking and recording.

Name: Yōkaizen
Description:
Yokaizen  The Digital Omamori 

We’re reinventing how the world builds self-worth  by wrapping evidence-based micro-skills inside manga/anime, micro-quests, AI companions, and a smart ring.

Our thesis: To help youth, you must create something they want to use, not something they should use. Yokaizen isn’t a mental-health app; it’s an entertainment platform where impact is the byproduct.

How it works
Stories first. Interactive manga/anime where your choices shape the narrative and unlock secret endings.

AI Yokai companion. A culturally aware side-kick that remembers your wins, checks in after quests, and offers the next tiny step, without judgment.

Confidence quests. Five-minute, gamified actions that turn ideas into embodied skills (CBT/ACT/Morita/Naikan).

The Ring. A wearable bridge to the physical world—detects stress trends (e.g., HRV dips) and triggers just-in-time micro-support.

Why now / why big
Manga & anime are the global rails for Gen Z culture: the manga market is ~US$15–16B in 2024 and on track for ~US$42–54B by 2030–33; anime is ~US$33–34B and trending toward ~US$60–64B. 

We blend those fandoms with AI and wearables to create a phone-to-ring experience that feels like magic and travels globally.

Who we serve
Gen Z (self-worth), families & caregivers (reassurance), and educators/employers (resilience). Japan first, global next.

What we believe
Upstream self-worth acts like a psychological immune system. Build it early; everything downstream gets easier.

Join us
Creators, VTubers, studios, schools, and brand partners—let’s build the world’s most meaningful entertainment platform.

Specialties: interactive manga/anime, AI companions, wearables (HRV), CBT/ACT/Morita/Naikan, AR quests, LINE mini-apps

Name: Benefact4
Description:
Benefact4 is more than just a smartphone app – it’s a gateway to personalized giving, tailored to users’ passions and interests. With Benefact4, you can effortlessly track your own volunteer efforts…time, donations, and in-kind contributions: food to a food bank, volunteering at an animal shelter, etc., and share your support with others in your network to inspire even more support for the causes you love.
 
Imagine scrolling through your feed and seeing causes close to your heart and those of close friends or family members, inspiring each other to give even more. Together, we make a greater impact together than we can alone. 
 
Benefact4 also becomes a way for you to celebrate the difference you are making in the world. It’s easy for us to overlook the small ways we contribute, but when they’re visible in one place, we can see the impact we’re making…and it makes us want to do more. It also inspires others to volunteer for the causes we love. 
 
Benefact4 is a community for givers…a movement of generosity in times when we need it the most.
In a nutshell the benefits of participation:
•	Your membership and volunteers can track all their donations, volunteer hours, time in service, and in-kind efforts.
•	Your organization can add events for users to find when searching for opportunities in your area – fundraiser, volunteer or run a race.
•	You can create more visibility for your campaigns when forming a group to exponentially increase impact through collaboration. 
•	You can find new donors in a safe community of like-minded supporters who are searching for the same kind of connection.

Name: RENDR
Description:
RENDR is a mobile measuring app built for contractors by contractors. Time is money. Save both by streamlining the first step in the renovation process simply and accurately.

Due to the increasing demand for remote engagement and the introduction of LiDAR in newer mobile phones, RENDR is harnessing both.  RENDR enables remodeling companies to increase profitability, make homeowners lives safer, and add convenience to both. Not to mention, millennials are prone to favor companies that are utilizing technology more effectively, and they are quickly on their way to becoming the largest generation of homeowners.

Eliminating the initial consultation all together will be a value-add for any contractor. Knowing that an accurate estimate can be created without visiting the home, contractors can focus on bidding more projects in less time, and spend more time with paying clients.. Most field measures and face-to-face meetings can be limited to pre-qualified and even sold projects.  Leveraging an intuitive and lightweight, technical solution also differentiates the modern contractor from the competition.

For the contractor, once they receive a lead, they can invite a customer to scan their entire space, whether a small bathroom or an entire level. RENDR  captures every level of detail that a contractor will need, from the measurements of walls to the location and sizes of doorways, windows and bulkheads.

For the homeowner, it’s a safe and convenient way to obtain several quotes on their project. No need to take off of work or time away from family to meet contractors before choosing the right company for the job. In just a few minutes, a scan can be completed and the search for the right contractor is done right from their inbox.

RENDR is a recession-proofing tool for any remodeling business, and a convenience add for any of their clients. RENDR helps remodelers doing the rest of the world in doing business more conveniently.

Name: Chatsie
Description:
Chatsie was founded by George Bevis, after watching his mother struggle to use an iPhone. He realised, that as the world becomes more and more digital, older people are simply being left behind. They long to stay connected to their loved ones, but the prospect of learning how to use new technology is so daunting, it stops them from doing so. 

This “digital divide” has serious consequences for our society. If we do nothing, then older people will lose their independence faster, and their happiness will also rapidly decline. Ironically, technology is the solution to this problem! 

That’s why we built Chatsie. Chatsie is on a mission to make sure that older people aren’t left behind. We want to see a world where they remain connected, engaged, and included in modern society.

Ein Unternehmen mit Tradition für Innovation

IBL-HYDRONIC ist inhabergeführter Spezialist für die Automation mobiler Maschinen mit jahrzehntelanger Erfahrung und tiefgreifenden Marktkenntnissen.
Wir entwickeln, fertigen und integrieren seit 1989 in Deutschland komplette hydraulische und elektronische Systeme für mittelständische Hersteller von Baumaschinen, Agrar- und Forstmaschinen sowie Kommunal- und Sonderfahrzeugen. Unser Portfolio reicht von einfachen Steuerblöcken bis hin zu anschlussfertigen Gerätesteuerungen inklusive fortschrittlicher Bedieneroberfläche.
Dabei können wir auf Komponenten starker Partner sowie auf Produkte aus eigener Entwicklung zurückgreifen. Hausinterne Montage- und Fertigungskapazitäten für kleine bis mittlere Losgrößen inklusive hochmoderner 3D-Drucker für den Serieneinsatz ermöglichen es uns, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu erzeugen und garantieren kurze Reaktionszeiten nebst einer herausragenden Liefertreue.
Unser Unternehmen ist nach ISO 9001:2015 zertifiziert. Wir bekennen uns zum Standort Deutschland und verstehen ‚Made in Germany‘ als Qualitätsversprechen und als Auftrag, Anwendern innovative Lösungen mit klarem Mehrwert bereit zu stellen.
IBL-HYDRONIC hebt sich mit dem umfassenden Angebot deutlich von Unternehmen aus dem Wettbewerbsumfeld ab, die als reine Systemintegratoren oder nur als Komponentenlieferanten auftreten.

Name: Taksi Maxim Türkiye
Description:
Taksi Maxim, taksinizi ister hemen şimdi çağırmanızı, isterseniz ileri bir tarih için rezerve edebilmenizi sağlayan bir akıllı telefon uygulamasıdır.

Kullanımı son derece pratik olan Taksi Maxim ile düz güzergahlar haricinde duraklı rotalar da planlayabilirsiniz.

Yorum ve puanlara bakarak kolaylıkla aracınızı seçip fiyatı önceden öğrenebilir ve istediğiniz zaman çağırabilirsiniz.

Yolculuğunuzun sonunda ödemenizi nakit veya kredi kartınızla yapabilirꓼ hatta ödemenizde uygulama içindeki bonuslarınızı da kullanabilirsiniz.

Global trendlerden çok önce, 2003 yılında, Taksi Maxim’i kurduk. Amacımız taksi arayan yolcularla yolcu arayan taksicileri bir araya getiren servis sunmaktı. İlk başta telsizle çalışan sistemimizi 2007 yılında doğrudan kullanıcı etkileşimi sağlayan dijital bir hizmet platformuna dönüştürüp taksi çağrılarını telsizle alan sürücüleri bu platforma bağlı çalışan mobil uygulamamıza transfer ettik. 

Başlarda sadece taksi çağırma ve yolcu bulma için kullanılan akıllı telefon uygulamamızı kullanıcılarımızın gelişen ve değişen ihtiyaçları paralelinde geliştirerek yemek siparişi teslimatı, online alışveriş, kurye ve kargo çözümleri, modern taşımacılık, araç kiralamadan yol yardımı ve tamirat hizmetlerine kadar geniş yelpazedeki katma değerli yenilikçi hizmetlerle zenginleştirdik.

Tamamı modern taşımacılık hizmetleri olarak adlandırılabilecek sektörümüzün dönüşümüne teknolojik uzmanlığımız ve inovatif çözümlerimizle aktif olarak katkı sağlıyoruz.

Maxim olarak farklı şehirlere ve ülkelere seyahat eden herkesin ihtiyaç duyduğu hizmetlere kolayca ulaşabilmelerini sağlayan küresel bir marka olmayı hedefliyorꓼ faaliyet gösterdiğimiz her şehir ile ülkede yerel halk, ekonomi ve işletmelerin gelişmesi için gayret gösteriyoruz.

Description:
As a tech social enterprise based in Nairobi, Kenya, Flux's mission is to leverage technology to provide equitable access to basic needs, for a quality life for all! We are starting with equitable access to clean water!
    There is a looming water crisis, the world over! Coupled with aging infrastructure, water utilities in developing economies lose nearly 50% of water from leakages, pilferage, poor metering or corruption. Consequently, only a small fraction of people have access to clean potable water and sanitation and for only a couple of hours a day!
     Flux empowers developing economies by digitally transforming and providing data-driven water resource management for sustainable access to clean water and sanitation for all. We have developed a system that leverages existing technology to meet the unique needs of developing economies. 
    A system that will change the African narrative and that of many developing economies to one of sustainable access to clean potable water and hygienic sanitation by everyone! A system created by us, for all of us!

Name: HVAC Toolkit
Description:
The HVAC ToolKit is an easy-to-use app that has been created to assist HVAC engineers in checking their designs and making quick calculations and estimations. 

The app includes helpful calculation tools for calculating friction losses in ducting, pipe sizing, parking ventilation, staircase pressurization, and estimating heat loads, pump head, fan ESP, among others, where the user is able to enter the required inputs and is given the calculated output. 

Each tool also includes instructions and abbreviated formulas that have been used to calculate the results. 

The app can be set to metric or imperial units and/or to the English or Arabic language.

Users are expected to have some knowledge and understanding of HVAC engineering in order to use the tools properly. Users are also expected to check that the results are within an acceptable range for their respective projects. 

If you come across any inconsistencies while using the app or have any recommendations for additional inclusions, please contact us.

Name: EasyAs Invoicing for NDIS Providers
Description:
EasyAs Invoicing in a NDIS specific invoicing platform designed for use by NDIS providers on your computer or smart device 

The only invoicing app built specifically for NDIS providers. 
Designed by NDIS plan managers, it eliminates errors, takes the guesswork out of invoicing, and helps to ensures you get paid faster — every time by reducing error rejections from NDIS plan managers.

EasyAs Invoicing includes all the NDIS item number and rates, prepopulated for every date - no more trying to keep up to date when the NDIS increase hourly rates.  EasyAs Invoicing will take care of this for you!!  Of course many NDIS providers and their participants will negotiate lower rates for supports and you can manually change your hourly rate in EasyAs.

Let’s face it, the NDIS invoicing process can be overwhelming. The official NDIS Pricing Arrangements is over 100 pages long, and with hundreds of codes to choose from, it’s no wonder so many providers struggle to get it right.

But what if invoicing could be simple, accurate, and stress-free? EasyAs Invoicing is the NDIS Invoicing App that you’ve been waiting for! It’s been specifically designed to make NDIS invoicing quick and easy for NDIS providers.

Found our more on our website and some helpful Invoicing Guidelines here: https://easyasinvoicing.com.au/

Name: YOLUNDA
Description:
YOLUNDA, ulaşımı daha verimli ve sürdürülebilir hale getirmeyi amaçlayan bir teknoloji şirketidir. Misyonumuz, sürücülere yoldayken zaman ve para tasarrufu yapmalarına yardımcı olmak ve çevresel etkilerini azaltmak için çalışmaktır.

Teknolojinin dünya genelindeki ulaşım sorunlarını çözebileceğine inanıyoruz. Bu nedenle, trafik koşullarına, sürüş alışkanlıklarına ve hava durumuna göre gerçek zamanlı olarak optimize edilmiş rotalar ve kalkış zamanları sağlayan yenilikçi bir mobil uygulama geliştirdik. Uygulamamız ayrıca kullanıcıların araçlarına en verimli yakıt ikmali noktalarını bulmalarına da yardımcı olur, böylece çevresel etkilerini daha da azaltırlar.
YOLUNDA olarak, herkes için daha sürdürülebilir bir gelecek yaratmak için teknolojinin gücünü kullanmaya kararlıyız. Uygulamamızı sürekli olarak geliştiriyor ve ulaşımı daha verimli, kullanışlı ve çevre dostu hale getirmek için yeni yollar keşfediyoruz.
Siz de bize katılın, ulaşımı devrimleştirerek dünyayı daha iyi bir yer haline getirmeye yardımcı olun.
-----------------------
Yolunda is a technology company that aims to make transportation more efficient and sustainable. Our mission is to help drivers save time, money and reduce their environmental impact while on the road.
We believe that technology can solve some of the world's most pressing transportation challenges. That's why we've developed an innovative mobile application that provides drivers with real-time, optimized routes and departure times based on traffic conditions, driving habits, and weather. Our app also helps users find the most efficient fueling stations for their vehicles, further reducing their environmental footprint.
At YOLUNDA, we're committed to using the power of technology to create a more sustainable future for everyone. We're constantly improving our app and exploring new ways to make transportation more efficient, convenient, and eco-friendly.
Join us on our mission to revolutionize transportation and make the world a better place.

Name: MyTime
Description:
MYTIME : Révolutionnez la Gestion de Votre Temps de Travail

Dans un monde où le temps est une ressource précieuse, MYTIME s'impose comme la solution incontournable pour une gestion du temps efficace et flexible. Conçu pour simplifier la vie des équipes RH et des managers, MYTIME transforme les processus complexes en actions simples et intuitives.

Une Solution Modulable pour Chaque Entreprise

MYTIME est une plateforme SaaS complète, modulable et sans installation matérielle. Que vous soyez une PME ou une grande entreprise multisite, notre solution s'adapte à vos besoins spécifiques. Avec MYTIME, fini les contraintes des badgeuses fixes ! Pointage par smartphone, QR code, NFC, téléphone fixe ou internet : vos collaborateurs peuvent pointer où qu'ils soient, sans aucune contrainte technique.

Un Suivi en Temps Réel pour une Gestion Optimisée

MYTIME comptabilise le temps de travail en temps réel, offrant un suivi précis des heures travaillées, heures supplémentaires, pauses et repos. Notre système permet une gestion simplifiée des heures de récupération, jours fériés, et heures majorées. Tout est automatisé pour réduire les erreurs, faciliter la paie, et assurer la conformité légale, tout en augmentant la productivité.

Une Interface Intuitive et Accessible

MYTIME offre une interface conviviale accessible sur PC, tablette et smartphone. Les collaborateurs accèdent à leur espace personnel, consultent leur planning, pointages, et gèrent leurs demandes de congés en quelques clics. Les managers disposent d’un outil puissant pour superviser les équipes, gérer les plannings, et obtenir des rapports d'activités détaillés.

Un Partenaire de Confiance

Depuis 2011, MYTIME accompagne des milliers d'utilisateurs dans la gestion du temps et des ressources humaines. Notre équipe dédiée vous soutient à chaque étape, avec un service client réactif et à l'écoute. Avec MYTIME, simplifiez vos processus RH et concentrez-vous sur l'essentiel : la réussite de votre entreprise.

So why aren't we? Well, there has never been a better time to start. The pandemic is over, fuel prices are skyrocketing and we are all looking for ways to contribute to saving our planet. So let's do it!

Users praise one sec as the “holy grail for ADHD relief”.

 Sports
Studies have shown that reduced social media use leads to increased sport activity.

Studies have shown that reduced social media use leads to reduced smoking behavior.

 Save money
Prevent impulse purchases with one sec.

 Sleep better
Prevent scrolling mindlessly before you go to bed – and block apps automatically after waking up.

With one sec, you‘ll notice both a short-term and long-term effect on your social media usage: 

1. Unconscious phone habits are prevented right away (“Why did I even want to open that app?”) and 
2. long-term habits change because these apps appear less appealing to your brain (their “dopamine on demand” effect fades away).

This effect has been confirmed in a study with the University of Heidelberg and Max Planck Institute where we detected a reduction of social media usage by 57% thanks to one sec. Read our paper: https://psyarxiv.com/nwuar

Name: Crowd Impact
Description:
Wer Emissionsdaten zu Kulturveranstaltungen erhebt, stellt mit Überraschung fest, dass der anfallende Publikumsverkehr der größte Faktor ist.
Doch ausgerechnet für diesen emissionsstarken Bereich gibt es bisher keine brauchbaren Werkzeuge zur Datenerhebung – lediglich Zettel, Stift, Excel-Sheets und jede Menge manuelle Arbeit. Eine fehlerfreie und statistisch signifikante Besucher:innenumfrage und -auswertung sprengt derzeit fast jedes Budget und vorhandene Wissensstände. 
Hier bieten wir mit Crowd Impact eine kostengünstige, einfach zu bedienende Lösung. Das System führt die Besuchenden am Veranstaltungseinlass mittels iPad und eigens entwickelter App durch eine intuitiv gestaltete, spielerische Mobilitätsumfrage. Die App errechnet anhand dieser Daten den verursachten CO₂-Ausstoß und stellt sie dem Kulturbetrieb zusammengefasst zur Verfügung. Lösungen zur emissionsärmeren Anreise können so präziser ausgearbeitet und deren Auswirkungen in Folgeveranstaltungen überprüft werden. Das Publikum wiederum bekommt Tipps zur klimafreundlicheren Anreise am Ende der Umfrage. Durch dieses zweifache Wirken können Kulturbetriebe ihre CO₂-Emissionen mittel- und langfristig deutlich reduzieren. Crowd Impact verhilft Kulturbetrieben zu belastbaren, statistisch signifikanten Besucher:innendaten für die CO₂-Bilanz ihres jährlichen Nachhaltigkeitsberichts.

The core of WHIP relies in developing and distributing off-road sport technologies to consumers and businesses. WHIP's flagship product is WHIP LIVE, a mobile app for off-road sports enthusiasts that can be downloaded on the iOS App store and Android play store. The company also offers highly competitive safety services to organizing committees of mountain bike and moto enduro events on a global scale.

WHIP develops and distributes off-road sport technology to consumers and businesses. The company created and patented a data fusion algorithm that can gather high level metrics for action sports through common consumer devices, such as mobile phones and action cameras. The flagship product of WHIP is the app WHIP LIVE, the ultimate performance tracker and social network for off-road sports enthusiasts. The app processes raw data collected by different sensors of consumer devices into advanced metrics and paths specific for off-road sports. WHIP LIVE analyzes from 4 to 20 times more data points than other common tracking apps.

The functions of WHIP LIVE are: - Live tracking - Performance review - Safety Tracking (Share your live location) - Search Engine for Off-Road Routes - Off-road Navigation - Social Network for Riders

WHIP offers services for safety and navigation to organizing committees of mountain bike and off-road competitions or events. This service is high-quality and delivered at a much lower cost than the competitors.

Damit im Krankenhaus wieder mehr Zeit für die wirklich wichtigen Aufgaben bleibt: Mehr Zeit für die Therapie, mehr Zeit für die Genesung und mehr Zeit, um sich zu schonen. Mit unseren Lösungen, wird das möglich.

Wir sind ein Start-up-Unternehmen, welches die umfassende Expertise von Ärzten, Pflegekräften und Software-Entwicklern miteinander vereint. Daher wissen wir genau, mit welchen Schwierigkeiten Krankenhäuser zu kämpfen haben, unter welchen Problemen Patienten, Angehörige sowie das medizinische Fachpersonal tagtäglich leiden und wie Lösungen dafür technische realisiert werden können.

Wir möchten uns nicht alleine vorwärts bewegen, sondern gemeinsam. Wir glauben an Interoperabilität. Deshalb entwickeln wir unsere Software, auf die alle gemeinsam zugreifen können, um auf einer einzigen Plattform iteroperabel und kompatibel zu arbeiten.

Denn wir sehen Digital-Health als eine Einheit. Hier wirken alle Softwares synergetisch und dienen dabei einem großen Ziel: Unser Gesundheitssystem zu revolutionieren, um unsere Patientenversorgung entscheidend zu verbessern.

Name: un-app
Description:
What problem are we solving ?

Smartphones were meant to simplify. Instead, they overwhelm us with taps, alerts and prompts. We spend more time serving apps than they do serving us.

Why are we solving it ?

Because not every blink on your phone deserves your eyes, ears and mind. We believe your phone should act on your behalf - saving you effort, reducing noise and giving you back headspace.

How are we solving it ?

un-app is inspired from the term you-as-an-app that builds YOUR AI, an on-device agent that:

Builds YOUR knowledge graph (your phone remembers you)
Enables lazy prompting (no long prompts, it just hints, helps, handles)
Cuts phone overwhelm (fewer to-and-fro distractions, less frustration)

Our north-star ?

Phones will evolve from being just screens you command … into agents that act for you, sovereign to you ... becoming YOUR PERSONALIZED OS.

un-app is like any other app on your phone, but that does not have any of your personal coordinates like phone number, email id etc ... its privacy-respecting, evolving from observer to helper to doer with full autonomy to you and built for everyday life at scale.

Built on SLM / LWM leveraging Gen AI pipeline and Agentic AI framework, incorporating the evolving concepts of MCP, A2A, ADK, Distillation, Knowledge graph, RLHF, etc

PS : The problem was discovered through an exhaustive customer survey involving close to a thousand humans across Gen Z and Millenials, bumping into them with a set of questions, that led us to believe we are solving the apt problem persona.

Name: RNDox
Description:
RNDox is an academic electronic medical record designed exclusively for nursing curriculum enhancement. Its design and features support the mandates set forth by the American Association of Colleges of Nurses Essentials: Core Competencies for Professional Nursing Education (2021). 

This solution serves to “bridge the gap between education and practice” (AACN, The Essentials, 2021, p. 1). 

Some Software Highlights:
Faculty can create unlimited case scenarios, increasing scholar-focused content for beginners and advanced learners.  
Case scenarios contain timelines with flowsheets categorized by body systems, vital signs, lab values, intake and output data, and screening tools. 
Nursing scholars can chart individual care and assessments, communicate with providers, and write narrative notes that can be written in classrooms, simulations, and lab settings.
Faculty portals are designed to protect academic creativity, with entry into classes that are code-protected.
Medication administration in simulation and skills lab settings uses barcode scanning as a client identifier.

Some Benefits: 
Aligns with AACN Essentials

Name: SizzleHire
Description:
Running a restaurant is tough. Hiring shouldn’t be.

In the restaurant business, speed is everything. Lose a line cook on Friday, and Saturday service suffers. Post a job online, and you get a flood of resumes — most from people who never show up. The good ones? They’re hired by someone else before you even schedule an interview.

That’s why we built SizzleHire — the fastest way for restaurants and bars to hire the right people in minutes, not weeks. Our platform cuts through the chaos with short video profiles of pre-screened candidates — servers, bartenders, line cooks, chefs, dishwashers, managers — all ready to work.

And with our built-in talent bench, you’re building a lineup even when you’re not actively hiring. It quietly collects qualified, local candidates in the background so you’re never starting from scratch when you need someone fast.

We kill the staffing headaches that crush restaurants:
	•	Glacial hiring – Waiting weeks for staff? Not on our watch. Get people in hours.
	•	Serial ghosters – If they flake, they don’t make it to your screen. Period.
	•	Bad fits – We show you personality and hustle before you waste a shift on them.
	•	Last-minute bail-outs – Someone no-shows? Your talent bench is ready to roll.
	•	Turnover treadmill – Keep a steady pipeline so you’re not hiring from scratch every damn month.

Whether you run a busy café, a high-volume bar, or a multi-location restaurant group, SizzleHire is built for your pace. We speak your language, we know your pressure points, and we designed this so you spend less time chasing staff and more time running your business.

Click. Watch. Hire.
It’s not just our tagline — it’s the fastest way to keep your kitchen cooking and your front-of-house flowing.

Name: FieldPal.ai
Description:
FieldPal.ai is an AI assistant designed specifically for frontline workers, including engineers, technicians, operators, and inspectors who work away from desks, often in environments where access to knowledge is difficult, slow, or unsafe. 

Our platform dramatically reduces the effort required to find critical operational information, complete reports, and capture work all through a conversational, hands-free interface designed for real-world conditions.

FieldPal supports two core modes of operation:

Find – instantly surface technical documentation, procedures, manuals, and historical records
Capture & Report – record tasks, observations, and notes as free-form spoken or typed input.  Complete reporting 10x faster with improved accuracy.  

What makes FieldPal unique is its ability to operate as a conversational work interface, allowing users to work faster without stopping to search documents or complete forms manually. FieldPal adapts to the devices workers already carry—mobile phones, tablets, and wearable hardware—ensuring adoption without workflow disruption.

Our AI architecture powers this experience end-to-end:
Conversational and agentic AI orchestrate tasks, retrieve knowledge, and complete forms
Azure OpenAI + Speech + Document Intelligence transform unstructured information into actionable guidance
A long-term roadmap toward domain-tuned small language models and edge deployment will enable offline usage, low latency, and high-trust inference at the point of work

FieldPal addresses problems that legacy field software could not. Slow onboarding, limited knowledge access, heavy reporting burden, and poor tool usability. By bringing context-aware, voice-operated intelligence directly to the field, we reduce administrative overhead, close skill gaps, and help teams work safer, faster, and more precisely.

Glow-App is a free and innovative app that connects everyday consumers with professional service-providers in the beauty and personal care industry. It is the only app of its kind that brings these service providers, carefully curated by our team, to your door. 

●	How many times have you run into a situation in which you needed a salon-quality blow dry for an event, and could not find an available appointment?
●	Have you broken a nail or needed a manicure on short notice, only to realize your nail salon could not fit you in?
●	Need to get your eyebrows done, but your babysitter cannot make it?
●	Or do you have a special occasion for which you would like to treat yourself by getting your makeup done?

Glow-App is the solution to these situations and more, giving thousands of users access to available providers!

At Glow-App, your beauty solutions arrive at your door at minimum time with a maximum level of professionalism- you set the place and time, and we ensure that the right service provider comes right to you. That means no sitting in traffic, no scrambling to find a babysitter, no paying for parking and no waiting in lines. 

You can spoil yourself while saving money and time.

The use of Glow-App is simple and user-friendly, with service selection, appointment-setting with time and location, and payment, all through the app with several clicks. 

You can feel confident about your appointment knowing that you had access to all the information necessary to compare service providers based on photos of completed work, pricing, service types, availability, and most importantly- real ratings and reviews by fellow users.

Glow-App- Because maintaining your beauty is important to you!

Description:
therappai is the world’s first AI-powered video therapy app, designed to make mental health support accessible, affordable, and always available.

Traditional therapy is often expensive, difficult to access, and limited by schedules. Millions of people around the world go without the help they need — and that’s the gap therappai fills.

With live AI video therapy sessions, 24/7 chat support, mood tracking and journaling tools, and Crisis Buddy alerts, therappai reimagines therapy for the modern world. Our platform blends advanced AI with evidence-based methods like CBT and DBT to deliver support that’s both empathetic and effective.

We believe AI won’t replace human therapists — but it can bridge the gap for millions who currently have little or no access to care. Our mission is to democratize mental health support, making it private, secure, and affordable for everyone, everywhere.

Key Features

Live AI video therapy sessions

24/7 chat with AI support

Guided CBT/DBT exercises

Crisis Buddy alerts for real-time safety

Mood tracking & journaling tools

Encrypted, private conversations

Our Vision
To transform mental health support by putting affordable, personalized care in everyone’s pocket — available anytime, anywhere.

Name: StrideMatch
Description:
StrideMatch – The ultimate running shoe recommendation App, powered by AI.

StrideMatch is transforming the way runners choose their shoes. No more random trials or generic advice that doesn’t cater to individual needs. Using advanced AI, the app analyzes each runner’s biomechanics to recommend the perfect shoe based on their body type, posture, stride, and running style, ensuring an optimal fit and improved performance.

StrideMatch leverages powerful algorithms to process thousands of data points in seconds, providing precise recommendations. This results in a simplified, reliable shopping experience that maximizes comfort, performance, and significantly reduces injury risk caused by incorrect shoe choices.

At its core, we continuously gathers and analyzes detailed shoe data—structure, materials, cushioning, flexibility, and durability. But its innovation goes further. Through ongoing learning, it incorporates real-time wear data based on the runner’s usage profile and running surfaces.

StrideMatch is more than just a shoe recommendation tool—it’s a comprehensive support system for runners, ensuring a consistently optimal experience.

Whether you’re a casual jogger or a passionate athlete, StrideMatch is redefining how you approach running footwear, making running with confidence and perfectly fitted shoes a reality.

Rethink fit. Raise your standards.

We believe in safety in numbers — and our app makes it easy to link up with local buddies for shared runs, walks, hikes, or rides.

With group-trip tracking, in-app live chat, solo and group safeguarding tools, and our state-of-the-art SOS button — you're always ready for your next adventure.

 What does RouteBuddies do?

Our iOS and Android app makes it easy for community members to connect & stay safe on the go:

Group Trips: Running, hiking — you name it. We make it super easy for communities to co-ordinate group adventures together.

Trip Tracking: Track attendance, trip member locations, trip-specific chats, and more with our unique tools.

Safety First: Check-ins, a crime heatmap, trip sharing, and cutting-edge SOS support to have your back.

 Who is RouteBuddies for?

RouteBuddies is for everyone — but we're on a mission to create a safer world for women and a less lonely world for men.

We’re loved by:

Active Communities: Running, hiking, cycling, athletics clubs — we help create safe spaces for members to connect & protect each other.

Educational Institutions: Giving students top-tier safety tools to stay safe day-to-day and keep their loved ones updated.

Festivals & Events: Helping hundreds of thousands of attendees stay connected to verified security & offline safe zones.

 We keep it SUPER secure

All public communities use ID verification to protect women-only, men-only, and mixed spaces.

SOS & group trip rules are fully customisable — whether you want to link straight to event security, or connect your community together for help.

Name: arbusteo
Description:
arbusteo est un logiciel de gestion collaborative dédié aux professionnels du végétal : gestionnaires de parcs et jardins, collectivités, propriétaires privés, entreprises du paysage, élagueurs et experts. 

Conçu par Cédric Billod, arboriste grimpeur fort de 20 ans d’expérience, arbusteo est né d’un besoin concret : disposer d’un outil simple, fiable et complet pour relier le terrain, le bureau et tous les acteurs d’un même jardin.

Véritable réseau 2.0 des jardins, arbusteo centralise les données essentielles : inventaires, interventions, suivis, préconisations. Chaque utilisateur accède aux informations utiles à son rôle, favorisant la mutualisation des données.

Grâce à son interopérabilité avec QGIS, arbusteo s’intègre dans les pratiques professionnelles existantes. Il permet de relier la cartographie technique (réseaux, infrastructures, végétaux géolocalisés) à la gestion opérationnelle du patrimoine vivant. Cette connexion directe entre carte et terrain offre une vision globale et dynamique de chaque site.

Pensé par un professionnel du métier, arbusteo associe simplicité d’usage et rigueur technique. L’outil facilite la planification des travaux, le suivi des équipes et la traçabilité des interventions. Un module de suivi du temps de travail est en cours de développement pour simplifier la collecte et l’exploitation des données de chantier, dans une logique d’efficacité et de gain de temps.

En évolution constante, arbusteo s’enrichit grâce aux retours de ses utilisateurs et à une approche pragmatique du terrain. Il favorise une gestion durable et partagée des espaces verts. 

En réunissant sur une même plateforme toutes les informations utiles à la gestion du végétal, il devient un véritable outil de pilotage et de communication entre le terrain et la décision.

Issu de l’expérience, soutenu par l’innovation et animé par la passion du végétal, arbusteo incarne l’avenir de la gestion des jardins connectés.

Name: Yodel Pass
Description:
The mission of Yodel Pass is to provide innovative technology to improve the patron and provider experience for memberships, passes, tickets, and ID cards.  Yodel Pass started in 2019 and has had a focus on solving two problems using digital delivery to mobile devices:

1. The fraudulent use of passes, memberships, and tickets
2. Significantly reducing congestion at entrances to recreation facilities, events, and parking areas 

Using the latest software available, Yodel Pass developed a suite of products that provide a mobile device approach for digital delivery that replaces paper and plastic cards for all patron rate classifications. 

Fraud Prevention
Yodel Pass prevents the use of copied or fake passes by our unique contactless visual validation that deploys two factor authentication. The digitally delivered Yodel Passes have both a moving QR code and a changing code and color. Staff  can look at the passes and identify fraudulent passes immediately. 

Congestion Reduction
For vehicles, passes can be validated by license plate. For patron entrances, a group can hold up their digital devices and be waved in if they have the correct code and color along with a QR code that is moving. This contactless visual validation eliminates congestion at entrances. In addition, the Yodel Mobile Cashier is a hand held mobile device that provides the flexibility for  rapid sale and validation of passes outside of a booth.

Your current operating system is passive. It watches. It calculates. It sells. We believe your technology should protect.

The 10-Second Lifeline: In a crisis, you don’t have time to dial. Our Bio-Metric Threat Detection and 10-Second Threat Response protocol autonomously sense distress and alert authorities before you even whisper.

A Shield for the Vulnerable: We are the digital bodyguard for the student walking home late, the elderly parent living alone, and every woman who deserves to navigate the world without fear.

Engineered in Bengal, For Bharat.We are proud to be the digital infrastructure for a Surakshit Bangla and a Viksit Bharat. We are proving that the next global revolution in technology won’t come from a garage in California, but from the heart of West Bengal.

Name: SparkReceipt
Description:
SparkReceipt is a SaaS platform aimed at simplifying the management of financial documents like receipts, invoices, and bank statements, primarily for small businesses, freelancers, and individuals. The application enables users to better sort expenses and apply for tax deductions without requiring a full accounting suite.

One key feature is its OCR technology, enhanced by OpenAI's ChatGPT, for quick and accurate scanning of documents. Unlike other apps that rely on pattern matching against known databases, ChatGPT can contextually understand and categorize data from various vendors and chains, making the platform more robust and up-to-date.

For teams, SparkReceipt offers collaborative tools, allowing multiple users to manage financial documents under the same account. This resolves the complications of using methods like email to share and track numerous documents.

The platform also supports over 150 currencies and provides accurate currency conversions, benefitting businesses with international operations.

With tiered pricing including a free option, SparkReceipt is accessible for different sizes of businesses. The Pro subscription offers features such as inviting an accountant, auto-scanning receipts from email, and unlimited document storage.

SparkReceipt fills a gap in the market by offering a comprehensive yet simple solution for pre-accounting and expense tracking. It's a middle ground between expensive accounting software and basic expense tracking apps, meeting a variety of pre-accounting needs.

Qurania is an innovative mobile app designed to help Muslims around the world understand the Quran directly in its original language. Built with the vision of making Quranic Arabic simple, engaging, and accessible, Qurania combines authentic Quranic stories with the power of AI to provide an interactive and personalized learning experience.

Unlike traditional Arabic courses, Qurania focuses only on the most frequent words in the Quran—helping users unlock meaning quickly without overwhelming grammar rules. Every lesson is inspired by Quranic stories, making the learning process not only practical but also spiritually meaningful.

 Key Features:

AI-Powered Learning: Interactive roleplay and instant feedback to make learning engaging and personalized.

Quran-Focused Vocabulary: Learn the most common words that appear throughout the Quran.

Story-Based Lessons: Short, meaningful Quranic stories that build emotional connection and aid memorization.

Beginner-Friendly Approach: No prior knowledge of Arabic required. Step-by-step guidance makes it accessible for everyone.

Gamified Experience: Progress tracking, levels, and achievements keep motivation high.

Completely Free: Qurania is available at no cost to ensure accessibility for the global Muslim community.

 Available on both Android and iOS, Qurania is already helping thousands of Muslims deepen their relationship with the Quran by understanding its words directly, without relying solely on translations.

At Qurania, we believe that every Muslim should have the opportunity to experience the Quran in its original language. Our mission is to bridge the gap between recitation and true understanding—using technology, AI, and modern learning methods to make Quranic Arabic approachable for all.

 Download Qurania today and take the first step towards connecting with the Quran in its original language.


 Visit: https://www.quranstories.pro/

Name: Tapply
Description:
Imagine if anytime you needed help with a software tool, the right expert instantly appeared on your screen. Tapply is building this reality—the first platform for universal, on-demand tech support. It's like the Genius Bar, but for any software tool, instantly accessible without leaving your desk. Connect with experts as easily as making a phone call—call when you need help, hang up when you're done, payment processes automatically. No contracts, no upfront costs, no red tape.
Like Uber and Airbnb, Tapply operates as a distributed peer-to-peer marketplace. We focus on removing barriers to entry on the supply side, making it effortless for anyone to monetize their software expertise in spare time. This dramatically increases supply while market forces drive prices down and quality up—all compounding with scale. By tapping into a global talent pool, we deliver tech support that's faster, more affordable, and more targeted than anything available today.
The problem: Professionals spend nearly two hours daily stuck on software problems—60 full workdays annually, per McKinsey. Despite $58 billion spent on tech support, 78% of employees lack the expertise to use their daily tools effectively.
AI chatbots and YouTube tutorials help, but sometimes you need an expert who can see your screen and walk you through the solution. Traditional platforms like Upwork require contracts, escrow, and negotiations—fine for building websites, but uneconomical for 45-minute coaching sessions.
Our core insight: The real bottleneck isn't supply or demand—it's latency. When getting help requires hours of coordination, people only engage for emergencies. Reduce that to minutes, and everything changes. The market expands from major projects to everyday problems. When sessions start instantly and last 20–30 minutes, an entirely new class of providers emerges—students, professionals with spare time, anyone with knowledge and a few minutes free. Collapse the latency, unlock a new market.

Name: Cubish
Description:
Cubish transforms the Earth into over 5.1 trillion cubes, creating a unique geolocated social network based on Spatial Web technology.
 
Each cube acts as a geolocated container where anyone can create one or more Cube Domains: digital spaces for videos, audio, images, documents, interactive content and much more. Thousands of Cube Domains can coexist in a single cube, creating a unique layering of digital experiences and allowing users to leave content anywhere on Earth.
 
In the future, Cube Domains will be organized by quality through a merit-based system that highlights relevance, usefulness and impact, ensuring the most valuable content is prioritized. Cubish is an open, general-purpose system, just like the web once was.
 
Cube Domains are anchored to real-world coordinates and can expand into other cubes across streets, squares, shops, buildings and public or private spaces, even locations far apart. Each expansion can host different content depending on the location, creating a rich, distributed, geolocated digital network. "It is like taking a web domain or a social network and spreading it across the real world."
 
Today it starts with data. Tomorrow, immersive technologies like Virtual Reality (VR), Augmented Reality (AR), Mixed Reality (MR), Extended Reality (XR) and more will be fully integrated.
 
The team envisions Cubish as a geolocated social platform where people, communities, businesses and content coexist within the same spatially organized, interactive digital layer. It is the first true Spatial Web, designed to bring the web fully into the real world and create an intelligent, living digital layer seamlessly integrated into the physical space around us.
 
Cubish S.r.l., an innovative startup officially registered in the Business Register (VAT: IT10724711212), has 26 cofounders, including two corporate entities. Cubish is protected by PATENT PENDING No. 102025000004906, filed March 10, 2025.

We help brands transform physical products into interactive digital experiences that can be viewed, rotated and tried on across web, mobile and in-store platforms. From a single 3D capture we generate assets that power e-commerce, marketing, retail and social channels at scale.

Our end-to-end platform is fully owned and operated by Vyking. All technology is developed in-house and all IP is owned by us. Every stage, from 3D capture to final delivery, is controlled internally to ensure consistent quality, flexibility and scalability for every brand we work with.

Our ecosystem includes TurboScan for high-speed 3D scanning, a complete 3D software suite with virtual try-on, 3D viewer and AR view, and our 3D Production Studio for CGI and 3D content creation.

We’ve worked with brands including Adidas, Zara, Timberland, Dr. Martens, Represent, DMT Cycling and El Corte Inglés, redefining how products are experienced online by making 3D and AR production as fast and dependable as traditional photography.

Vyking is a cross-European company with offices in London, Paris and Berlin. We’re an independent self-funded team advancing 3D, AR and AI pipelines for the next era of fashion e-commerce.

Vyking’s immersive experience software can be integrated into any mobile app (iOS or Android), website or in-store environment through our SDK for Mac Mini. With an integrated CMS and automated optimisation for different platforms and applications, we allow manufacturers and retailers to scale immersive experiences for thousands of products.

3rd-i | The Safety App People Actually Use

Unlike traditional safety apps that are forgotten, forced, or rarely opened, 3rd-i was made for daily use. Whether walking home, ridesharing alone, out with friends, meeting someone new, or heading into an unfamiliar area, users can stream live video, audio, and location to trusted contacts or dispatchers instantly—with everything recorded and time-stamped if needed later.

What Makes 3rd-i Different?
• Live + recorded video, audio, and location sharing
• Squads: Like group chats, users can choose the Squad(s) they want to Go Live with (ex: college friends, family, work, home friends, etc...)
• Discreet emergency button that alerts dispatchers & shares your stream
• Community-based PSA posts for real-time safety awareness
• Designed for daily engagement, not just emergencies

Created by Students, Powered by a Movement
3rd-i isn’t another unused campus safety app. It was built by students, for students—with input from survivors and families affected by tragedy. Our nationwide ambassador (100+) and influencer programs (1500+) helps launch 3rd-i on college campuses across the country, driven by real peer-to-peer engagement.

Enterprise Subscriptions (300+ Users)
Empower your school, company, or organization with 3rd-i to build a safer, more connected community. Improve real-time safety documentation, reduce risk, and potentially lower liability insurance premiums.

Partner Program
Join our partner network and receive a custom marketing code to offer discounted subscriptions to your users, students, or customers—driving loyalty while prioritizing real-world safety.

Let’s build a safer, more connected world—together.

From 2010 to 2012, Metaio presented the first commercial 2-D Markerless Feature tracking application for print and television on a consumer mobile device and as a result won the ISMAR Tracking Contest in 2011.

Name: DGS
Description:
DGS is a next-gen software platform for wireless deployments that characterizes the Radio Frequency environment across multiple dimensions. Shaped by a holistic view of the wireless spectrum, the DGS portfolio of patented technologies is deep, wide, and well-structured. These technologies are highly applicable, defensible, and desirable to a broad range of licensees.
DGS offers two main solutions: wireless network optimization and critical asset protection.

As LTE and 5G push the limits of the Radio Frequency spectrum as a resource, DGS’s Wireless Network Optimization supports today and tomorrow’s wireless infrastructure. DGS CLEARSITE technology and software analyze and optimize an array of RF spectrum applications and network operations, all in real-time. Its functions include spectrum utilization, interference analysis, competitive benchmarking, dynamic spectrum sharing, and infrastructure management.

DGS also addresses threats from Radio Frequency-enabled devices– just as innovation has delivered increased capability, RF-enabled devices significantly increase vulnerability and risk. DGS’s Critical Asset Protection now includes components that defend against Radio Frequency threats. DGS CLEARSKY technology includes drone threat management, anomalous signal detection, and RF situational awareness.

DGS has a unique vantage point on the future of wireless networks, and has been awarded approximately 396 patents, with 121 patents pending for the advancement of spectrum monitoring and RF data management. These enable the capture and analysis of wideband spectrum data at the point of intercept for applications that deliver real-time situational awareness.

Efficient, quality-driven, and reliable, DGS transforms today’s communication networks while ushering in tomorrow’s 5G services.

Custom-designed computer hardware/software solutions available for specific needs.

We help connect reliable service providers with service seekers in the Maldives. We are working towards addressing social issues related to:

1. Geographical Challenge: The Maldives is a country with a unique geographic challenge. It consists of a large number of islands scattered across the Indian Ocean. People on these remote islands often face issues related to access to services and connectivity. The Fakir App addresses this challenge by bridging the gap between these isolated islands, enabling people to call for services regardless of their location.

2. Empowerment through Connection: The Fakir App empowers both service seekers and providers by offering a platform that connects them. In a nation where resources are limited and access to services are challenging, this platform provides a means for individuals to offer their services and generate income. This not only helps in addressing unemployment but also creates opportunities for people to become self-reliant.

3. Inclusive Care Services: Inclusive care services are vital for a community like the Maldives, where families struggle to find reliable care providers for their loved ones. The Fakir App plays a crucial role in connecting families with service providers and caring individuals. This inclusivity is especially important for families with diverse needs and busy schedules.

Key Benefits for Contractors/Vendors:

•	Single-Point Access: All government forecasts are available to contractors on a unified platform for easy mobile application access.
•	More for Less: Only one mobile app needs to be installed instead of separate apps for each department.
•	Convenience: Contractors don't even need to reinstall or update the app to access newly added government forecasts.
•	Time and Effort Savings: Contractors can check these forecasts anytime and anywhere on their mobile phones without visiting various government websites and reviewing multiple spreadsheets and documents.
•	Connect with Shared Interests: Contractors with similar interests can connect through the portal, communicate with each other, and join groups based on their needs.

Description:
Click-to-WhatsApp campaigns, despite their high lead acquisition costs, often suffer from significant churn when users are redirected to external web pages or web calendar forms at the end of the funnel. This critical drop-off can severely impact your ROI.

Callendar enables appointment scheduling entirely inside WhatsApp. This is a game-changer. Unlike traditional funnels that redirect users to external web pages or third-party appointment systems, Callendar keeps the entire booking process within the familiar and trusted WhatsApp environment. This eliminates the notorious churn when users are redirected to external pages, where friction points like slow loading times, unfamiliar interfaces, or the simple act of leaving WhatsApp cause a significant drop-off in conversions. With Callendar, your customers enjoy a frictionless, intuitive booking experience from start to finish.

Beyond seamless scheduling, Callendar ensures your efforts translate into actual conversions. We drive higher show-up rates thanks to automated, integrated WhatsApp reminders, directly reaching your booked leads on their preferred communication channel.

For robust internal management, Callendar provides a complete Calendar Management App available for iOS and Android. This powerful mobile application allows your team to view and manage all appointments on the go, offering a best-in-class unified experience. Businesses have the flexibility to either adopt Callendar's calendar as their primary system or integrate it to seamlessly coexist with their existing Google Calendar and Calendly setups.
By streamlining lead qualification, enabling in-app booking, preventing churn, and boosting attendance, Callendar directly contributes to a substantial increase in your marketing ROI, ensuring that every click from your ads translates into more qualified leads and confirmed appointments.

ThinkCut tarafından tasarlanan ürünümüz thinkSuite'e hoş geldiniz. 2019 yılında İstanbul, Türkiye'de kurulan thinkSuite, şirketinizin verimliliğini artırmanızı ve çalışanlarınıza daha fazla değer vermenizi sağlayan entegre yazılımlarla tek platform çözümü sunar.

thinkSuite, kuruluşunuzla çalışanlarınız arasındaki etkileşimi optimize eden dijital bir platformdur. Çalışan profillerinin tüm yönlerini kapsar ve şunları sağlar:
Temel İK Yönetimi: Operasyonel verimliliği artırmak için temel İK işlevlerini basitleştirin.
İş Gücü Yönetimi: İş taleplerine uygun şekilde iş gücünüzü etkili bir şekilde yönetin ve konumlandırın.
Çalışan Bağlılığı: Etkili bağlılık stratejileriyle çalışan memnuniyetini ve sadakatini artırın.

Misyonumuz
thinkSuite olarak, karmaşık İK süreçlerini basitleştirmek ve dinamik iş ortamında başarılı olmaları için organizasyonlara gerekli araçları sağlamak amacıyla çalışıyoruz. İşinizin genel hedefleri ile çeşitli çalışan profilleri arasında köprü olmayı hedefleyerek uyumlu ve üretken bir çalışma ortamı sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz.

Neden thinkSuite?
Entegre Çözümler: Platformumuz, karmaşıklığı azaltan ve kullanıcı deneyimini artıran tek noktadan kapsamlı İK çözümleri sunar.
Sürekli Yenilik: Çözüm setimizi teknoloji ve İK uygulamalarındaki en son yenilikleri kapsayacak şekilde sürekli olarak geliştirmeye kendimizi adamış durumdayız.
Güçlü Entegrasyon Yetenekleri: thinkSuite, çeşitli iş araçları ve sistemlerle sorunsuz bir şekilde entegre olur, İK işlevlerinizin pürüzsüz çalışmasını sağlar.

Name: Glowy
Description:
Most skincare content creators post images and videos every single day; however, their engagements are limited to likes and comments. Today, most users and consumers have to rewatch videos of their creators again and again to keep up with their updated skincare routines.

"Glowy" is a social engagement mobile platform for skincare influencers and users. It allows creators to engage with their audience by creating routines and reminding them to follow particular skincare and haircare routines on a daily or weekly basis.

A creator can become an integral part of the day-to-day lives of their audience. They will gain genuine insights into how many people actually adhere to their routines, all from the comfort of their phones. These statistics can elevate their media kit while collaborating with brands. Whether you are a seasoned skincare influencer or just starting out, our app helps you connect with your audience and grow your brand. All you must do is sign up, create a profile, and enter detailed routines that you want to share with other users. Voila!

What’s in it for the user, you may ask? Glowy helps users build consistency. Imagine receiving a notification on your phone that it is time to do your favourite influencer’s skincare routine. What if you could browse suggested routines from dermatologists around the world? As a user, all you have to do is download the mobile application, start following routines suitable to you, and let us remind you to follow them.

․

10) 24/7 աջակցություն ծրագրի թիմի կողմից

11) Ամենակարևորը ․․․ օգտվելով VIP ստատուսով մասնագետներից, վճարված գումարի 5-80%-ը (մասնագետի էջում %-ը երևում է) մասնագետը նվիրաբերելու է խիստ անհրաժեշտ բժշկական միջամտության կարիք ունեցող երեխաների և մեծահասակների դրամահավաքներին (հենց ծրագրի ներսում)

Name: Parcelles Explorer
Description:
'Parcelles Explorer' est une application mobile de cartographie immobilière


Elle s'adresse aussi bien aux professionnels de l'immobilier qu'aux particuliers:
✓ prospection ,
✓ localisation d'un bien immobilier à partir d'une annonce,
✓ veille informationnelle sur le marché, …
✓ recherche d'un bien immobilier (maison, appartement ou terrain),
✓ estimation des prix pratiqués dans un secteur,
✓ consultation des zones et des documents d'urbanisme, …

Elle vous permet de visualiser pour la France métropolitaine et les départements d'outre-mer:
✓ le cadastre: communes, parcelles, bâtiments, piscines, …
✓ les transactions immobilières depuis 2014 (données DVF / Demandes de Valeur Foncière),
✓ les numéros de rue (BAN)
✓ la quasi intégralité des informations des 3 premières pages des DPE réalisés depuis juillet 2021
✓ le Plan Local d'urbanisme (PLU): zones d'urbanisme, documents, …
✓ les objets surfaciques (bâtiments, piscines, …): emprise, nature, année de construction, …
✓ les copropriétés,
✓ les propriétaires personnes morales,
✓ la cartographie aérienne et souterraine des lignes (HTA/BT) et postes exploités par Enedis, …

La localisation de parcelles se fait facilement et rapidement à partir:
✓ de son numéro de cadastre
✓ de son adresse,
✓ de sa coordonnée géographique,
✓ de la carte,
✓ de la géolocalisation du mobile, directement sur le terrain,
✓ ou du moteur de recherche de parcelles (à partir de critères tirés d'annonces immobilières), …

L'outil de recherche avancé permet d'identifier une liste de parcelles répondant à certains critères:
✓ surface de la parcelle,
✓ présence ou absence d'objets surfaciques sur la parcelle (bâtiment, piscine, lac, …)
✓ emprise de ces objets surfaciques,
✓ zone d'urbanisme,
✓ indices du DPE,
✓ date du DPE,
Avec la possibilité d'appliquer tous ces critères à une ou plusieurs parcelles contigües.

L'outil permet ainsi de retrouver relativement facilement un bien immobilier à partir d'une annonce de vente.

Name: My Bodega Online
Description:
Bodega Delivery (Ceased operations in May 2022). 

DM @glaction for questions and follow-ups.

------ ------ 

My Bodegas Online was a digital ordering platform for small grocery stores in New York City and Philadelphia. 

Our Story
We were born in Washington Heights, an immigrant neighborhood of New York City. But our story is not only a New York story, it is a global story. In New York City our stores are called bodegas, but in Mexico they are abarrotes, in Philippines are called sarisairs, in Colombia the name is chuzo, in Japan is konbini, in Dominican Republic is colmado, in Singapore is mamak shop, and in India is kirana. 

But we stopped.  Perhaps others will find a way, but after years trying, we do not see our path forward. 
 
The problem has not been solved: mom-and-pop grocery stores need a new business model with technology to thrive.  We hoped that our ordering app with in-house delivery would be an answer. But timing and resources did not validate our thesis. 

Questions?

If you have any question  DM @glaction

Name: Paymeter
Description:
Paymeter App – Innovating Urban Mobility 

At Paymeter, we are redefining urban mobility with a smart, efficient, and seamless parking experience. Founded in 2019 in Andorra, we have grown to become the leading app for on-street and barrier-equipped parking in the country. Our innovative platform allows users to locate, reserve, and pay for parking spaces with just a few taps, eliminating the hassle of searching for a spot.

Since 2023, we have expanded our operations to Catalonia and multiple cities across Spain, offering drivers a cashless, real-time, and stress-free parking solution. In 2024, we partnered with Fundació MIFAS, integrating our platform into various municipalities for regulated parking, currently operating in Arbúcies, La Garriga, Pals, Peratallada, Santa Coloma de Farners, Banyoles, Palamós, and Cassà de la Selva.

Beyond user convenience, Paymeter also optimizes parking management for municipalities and operators. Our integrated controller app enhances enforcement by streamlining access control and fine issuance, reducing administrative burden and improving efficiency. Moreover, our full integration with EasyPark allows cities to centralize their parking operations, offering greater flexibility to citizens.

Our partnership with SABA, a national leader in private parking, enables seamless reservations and payments across their entire network, ensuring drivers always find a spot when they need it.

Looking ahead, in 2025, we will expand to Salou and are actively seeking new cities and locations to operate in, both within and beyond Europe. If you are interested in partnering with us, feel free to reach out: info@paymeter.io.

At Paymeter, we are committed to sustainability and smart urban mobility, eliminating paper tickets and promoting digital, eco-friendly solutions. As we continue to expand, we are shaping the future of parking—one city at a time.

#Paymeter #SmartParking #UrbanMobility #ParkingTech #CashlessPayments #Innovation
