Name: Bikademy
Description:
Bikademy is an innovative product for cycling tourism and urban mobility.

Bikademy encourages people to cycle, to explore natural and cultural heritage by bike, and rewards them for doing so. Our main tool is a mobile app, and all registered users (free of charge for end users) become Bikademy Students. The app has two main features: Studies (tourism) and Challenges (mobility):

1. Studies (Tourism)
This feature functions as an “academy” with Studies representing different regions or cities. Each Study consists of Exams (locations with natural and cultural heritage).
The task of a Bikademy Student is to cycle to the designated Exam location, using any route and at any time, take a photo, and check in via the app, thereby completing the Exam. Upon passing all Exams within a Study, the Bikademy Student earns a reward.

2. Challenges (Mobility)
This feature is intended for all citizens, not just athletes. It’s free to use, and we reward top performers monthly, with separate categories for men and women. To accommodate different levels, Challenges has four categories based on total daily distances:
    0-10 km / daily
    10-20 km / daily
    20-60 km / daily
    60+ km / daily
Besides tracking distances, the app’s homepage shows CO2 savings compared to car travel and total rides completed.
This feature, as Internal Challenges, is also designed for cities and regions or companies to encourage residents or employees to use bicycles in daily life. For these cities or companies, we create a custom made dashboard showing citizens’ or employees' total kilometers, CO2 savings, and a leaderboard across all four categories. At the end of each year, we also provide a map of all rides within the area to aid in urban planning for cities.

Additional features:
Special Challenges: These campaigns focus on CO2 savings and distance covered within a set timeframe (up to two weeks) for various occasions 
Special Studies: In interesting locations, we open a smaller, temporary Study

Name: Impact-APP
Description:
Een web-based app. Op jouw manier en moment, laagdrempelig, snel en veilig incidenten melden/beheren. Makkelijk via je telefoon, altijd binnen handbereik. 

Nadat er een incident gemeld is, ontvangt het Collegiaal Opvang Team een notificatie. Op basis van de keuze van de melder worden de meldingen geclassificeerd en naar behoefte wordt er door het COTteam actie op de melding ondernomen. Zo krijgt de melder precies de aandacht, die nodig is!

Tijdens ons werk in de acute zorg hebben we met verschillende meldsystemen gewerkt. Vanuit deze ervaringen en expertise hebben we een unieke structuur opgezet. We hebben een systeem gebouwd waar we zelf graag mee willen werken: COTteam. 

COTteam is een incidenten meldsysteem: een systeem gemaakt voor en door gebruikers. Simpel, doeltreffend, praktisch en altijd binnen handbereik.

COTteam is een platform, waar je op eenvoudige wijze een incident kunt melden en snel contact kunt maken. De incidenten worden gebundeld en in statistieken weergegeven. 

Indien gewenst implementeren wij een op maat gemaakt nazorgtraject voor (het welzijn van) het COTteam binnen jouw organisatie.

Meeting all applicable U.S. Government cybersecurity and accreditation requirements for operational deployment—including use in classified, disconnected, and contested environments—T6 is the direct recipient of a multi-year U.S. Government contract for its commercial software platform, supporting standardized healthcare delivery across the U.S. Army, Navy, Marine Corps, Air Force, and Coast Guard throughout the full spectrum of operational environments.

At T6, our conviction is simple: the best way to protect peace is to prepare for war. Data saves lives.

Description:
We transform images into enterprise data.  Our Enterprise-Grade Barcode Scanning and OCR Software enables the capture of data from images from fixed or mobile device cameras. We power automation on robots, drones, conveyors and smart mobile devices.

Our barcode scanning and decoding software SDKs are used by companies and OEMs to provide automation solutions including scanning for enterprise Smartphone Apps, Drone Scanning, Robotics Scanning, Storage and Conveying, Self-Service Kiosks and Laboratory Analysis. The software scans barcodes for item tracking, inventory scanning and any barcode process in Logistics, Retail, Transportation and Healthcare. 

We provide Barcode Scanning/ Barcode Decoding/ Barcode Reading software as SDKs to enable smart devices with cameras to scan barcodes. 

Our team has been working in barcode scanning for a combined total of over 60 years and we developed many of the barcode scanners that are in use in critical enterprise solutions all around the world.

We offer the very best barcode scanning for the most difficult applications - including scanning many codes at once (Maxi-Scan), and scanning barcodes that are damaged or from images that may be low quality (limited resolution, low light, out of focus, etc.).

Viziotix's special algorithms enable multi code reading (Maxi-Scan) and sub-pixel resolution (Nano-Scan) to scan blurred images and maximize reading distances.

Checkout our website, www.viziotix.com, for further information.

Name: Monere
Description:
Monere’s NiADA (Non-Invasive Anemia Detection with AI) offers a smartphone-based solution for integrated anemia screening and self-monitoring.
Currently, approximately 430 million women use health apps to track menstrual cycles, pregnancy, and related health factors, with over 70 million active users each month. During menstruation and pregnancy, women are at high risk of iron deficiency, which, if left unaddressed, can progress to anemia. While most tracking apps monitor menstrual cycles, they lack built-in anemia screening, leading to underdiagnosis and delayed intervention. This delay contributes to productivity loss, increased disability, preterm births, cognitive impairment, and a reduced quality of life for women and their children. In the U.S. alone, 40% of girls and young women are at risk of iron deficiency anemia.

There is an urgent need for an integrated, smartphone-based self-monitoring tool that enables frequent, painless anemia screening. Early detection and timely intervention can help prevent or reverse anemia, improving women’s health outcomes and safeguarding the well-being of their children. By bridging this gap, NiADA has the potential to revolutionize women’s health monitoring and management.

Description:
mobileAxept pioneered text giving for churches in 2006.

A bi-vocational worship pastor noticed fewer people carried cash or even owned a checkbook, yet they wanted to give. His employer designed a text-to-purchase solution for retail. This birthed an idea. What if he could apply this secure technology to giving? And, so He did. He delighted his members by providing a secure and simple way to give their tithes and offerings. Soon, pastors sought out his GiveNow text giving solution for their churches. Today, mobileAxept is honored to serve some of the largest and fastest growing churches in the United States.
mobileAxept continues to innovate by offering two new services, ReachNow and ConnectNow.
mobileAxept has partnered with ministry leaders to develop ReachNow and ConnectNow to strengthen the relationships with their members. The ReachNow service enables the church to send timely text reminders, inspiring devotionals, or offering appeals. And, the ConnectNow service helps guests take that vital first step by filling out a virtual visitor card. 

Texting is becoming the preferred method to communicate and give. Combining mobileAxept’s ConnectNow and ReachNow with GiveNow solutions allows ministries to increase engagement with their members.

mobileAxept was acquired by i3 Verticals in July 2020 and continues to be the original true text-giving solution. Hundreds of nonprofits nationwide rely on us for text giving that actually works. As part of the i3 Verticals family, we now deliver enhanced PCI compliance and more integrated payment processing.
Our specialty software will integrate with your existing platforms and drive donations.

Nous sommes convaincus que U-Scan apporte un avantage considérable à votre entreprise en favorisant la responsabilité individuelle lors des essais routiers.

SIMPLICITÉ
Créez vos contrats d’essai routier en quelques clics
à partir de votre smartphone, tablette ou ordinateur.

de plaques professionnels et retrouvez chaque essai
routier en cours ou l’historique des enregistrements.

ACCESSIBILITÉ

RESPONSABILITÉ
Par l’adoption de U-SCAN favorisez la responsabilité individuelle et encouragez le respect du code de la route.

Name: AgriEID
Description: AgriEID is the leader in digital identification for livestock management. Advanced hardware and software integrated into a world class software platform for advanced livestock data analytics. AgriEID electronic and digital products are used every day by farmers and ranchers across the world. AgriEID is a complete digital farm management solution built by cattle farmers for tech challenged non digital savvy livestock producers and traders. AgriEID is an affordable solution that is being rapidly adopted due to its simplicity and powerful analytics that significantly improve operators profitability. Weak animals can be rapidly identified and medically treated so overall herd performance is lifted without having to waste expensive medical supplies on the entire herd. Average daily weight gains are automatically calculated in the system and progress charted over each individual animals time on the property. Medical records and notes are also recorded in AgriEID for detailed analytics with notes. AgriEID makes it easy to manage farm profitability with livestock purchase and sale prices combined with input cost recordings. Add in a rainfall gauge with historic analytics, machinery maintenance and a mobile app with GPS tracking for tractor work and you have a complete digital farm platform with all records stored safe and sound in the cloud. Also includes a to do list and calendar to manage farm work and planning. AgriEID cattle scales and EID readers can be purchased as a Digital Farm package for a complete turnkey solution. Over 5,000 livestock producers use AgriEID market leading integrated EID hardware and software technology with customers located around the world in the United States, Australia, New Zealand, Canada, United Kingdom and the European Union. AgriEID makes it easy and inexpensive for livestock farmers to collect and understand their animals’ important data metrics and make smart educated decisions so their farms can grow and flourish.

Name: Motion Nexus GmbH
Description:
Motion Nexus is creating a new generation of apps that are tailor-made to the individual anatomy of the user. 

Others are developing the autonomous car - we are developing the autonomous trainer. We create algorithms that measure and interpret individual human anatomy and biomechanics and put them into the context of the person's wishes and goals. 

Our vision is a fully autonomous intelligent system that supports people in any context of movement based on a test-retest process combined with visual analysis of movement quality. We are developing software that in the next 5 to 10 years will enable robots to guide pain management after surgery, help people improve their serve, master their first pull-up or learn karate. 

Understanding the biomechanical similarities and differences in the context of different sports will finally lead to a single algorithm that will be available as software for the autonomous trainer. In this way, we create a general movement intelligence that communicates with people, accompanies them and helps them to achieve their goals.

Name: Post My Property
Description:
Post My Property (PMP) is a next-generation real estate listing and lead-generation platform designed and developed by Vamsiram Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. It empowers property owners, buyers, and agents to seamlessly connect within a secure, transparent, and efficient digital ecosystem.

The platform simplifies property transactions by allowing users to buy, sell, or rent properties in just three easy steps, offering an intuitive and mobile-friendly interface built for everyone — from first-time sellers to professional realtors.

Key Highlights

Streamlined Experience: Post, manage, and promote property listings effortlessly from a single dashboard.

Smart Filters: Users can search properties by location, BHK, price, and property type for precise discovery.

Verified Listings: Ensures authenticity through compliance with RERA guidelines and user verification mechanisms.

Scalable Technology: Developed using a modern, cloud-ready stack that supports rapid scalability, high performance, and reliability across mobile and web platforms.

Secure Payments: Subscription-based listing model integrated with Razorpay, following RBI-compliant payment standards.

Responsive UI/UX: Adaptive design ensures optimal user experience across all devices and screen sizes.

Our Vision

To democratize real estate marketing by offering an affordable, transparent, and technology-driven platform where every property can reach the right audience — without middlemen, hidden fees, or complexity.

Legal & Compliance

PMP adheres to Indian laws under the IT Act 2000, SPDI Rules 2011, and the Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP), 2023, ensuring complete data security and privacy compliance. All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of Hyderabad Courts, India.

 Soutenir les vrais artistes : Nos dessins animés sont créés par de vrais artistes, justement rémunérés et valorisés au cœur de l'application.
 Écoresponsable : pas de collecte de données, pas de serveurs énergivores — uniquement des fichiers légers pour un impact minimal.
 10 minutes par jour : Erudit respecte les recommandations françaises pour introduire les écrans aux enfants, avec un temps d'écran limité et un contenu 100 % éducatif.

Name: BlindCell
Description: BlindCell is a high security and privacy end-to-end encrypted messaging app running on Android mobile phones and smart devices, which is developed and owned by Experts for Integrated Solutions. BlindCell uses the Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) algorithm, namely, the AES-256 algorithm to secure SMS messaging. The AES-256 algorithm has a key length of 256 bits, supports the largest bit size and is practically unbreakable by brute force based on current computing power, making it the strongest symmetric encryption standard. Thus, it protects the content of your SMS messages and it can only be disclosed by their destined recipients. BlindCell can be used to: (1) Send encrypted SMS messages through your default SMS messaging app; (2) Share encrypted text messages through your social media texting apps (e.g., WhatsApp, Viber, Messenger, Skype, etc.); (3) Share encrypted text messages through your web or private email account on (Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail, Outlook, etc.); and (4) Encrypt and store text messages on your mobile phone or smart device.

Unlock the path to a healthier you with Joyful, the AI-powered journaling app designed to support your mental well-being. Whether you're tracking thoughts, reflecting on your day, or exploring emotions, Joyful is your personal companion.

Why Joyful?

Life can be overwhelming, and sometimes, you need a little help. Joyful is more than just a journal—it's a mental health tool that offers support, motivation, and a safe space to express yourself. With Joyful, you can:

Reflect and Grow: Analyze your entries with AI-driven insights and prompts that encourage personal growth.

Voice Notes with Emotion Recognition: Record your thoughts and let Joyful detect your emotions, offering personalized feedback.

Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) Integration: Built on CBT principles, Joyful helps you manage thoughts and behaviors to improve your mood.

Key Features

1. AI-Powered Insights:
Joyful's empathetic AI reads between the lines to understand your mood and offer support when needed.

2. Voice Notes:
Speak your mind freely. Joyful's emotion recognition technology picks up on nuances in your voice to provide tailored responses.

3. CBT Tools:
Grounded in Cognitive Behavioral Therapy, Joyful guides you through exercises to challenge negative thoughts and build a positive mindset.

4. Unlimited Entries:
Capture every thought and emotion as you navigate your journey with unlimited text and voice entries.

5. Seamless Integration:
Joyful fits effortlessly into your daily routine, helping you reflect on your journey whenever and wherever.

Who Is Joyful For?

Perfect for anyone looking to improve mental health, develop self-awareness, and find peace in daily life. Whether you’re new to journaling or a seasoned pro, Joyful adapts to your needs.

1.Busy professionals looking for stress management.
2. Students needing a safe space to express feelings.
3. Parents reflecting on their parenting journey.
4. Anyone dealing with anxiety, depression, or everyday challenges.

Name: Simpliby
Description:
Simpliby is a cutting-edge mobile and web e-commerce application that is transforming the way we shop. Our app is designed with the goal of simplifying the buying experience for all shoppers, by eliminating many of the hassles and difficulties that are often encountered when shopping in person.

Our platform is incredibly user-friendly, and it is available on both mobile and web platforms. This means that anyone with an internet connection can log in and start shopping with ease. Once you have logged in to the Simpliby app, you can select any malls around your vicinity and browse through a wide range of available products.

One of the key benefits of using Simpliby is that it eliminates the need to physically cluster at a mall. This can be a major time-saver, especially for busy professionals or anyone with a hectic schedule. Instead, you can use the Simpliby app to select and reserve any item of your choice, which can then be picked up at a time that is convenient for you.

Another major advantage of Simpliby is that it provides a safe and secure platform for online shopping. Our app uses state-of-the-art encryption technology to protect user data and ensure that all transactions are secure. Additionally, our customer support team is available 24/7 to help with any issues or concerns.

Perhaps one of the most unique features of Simpliby is that it allows sellers and store owners to get paid for reserving an item. This means that sellers can be assured that the item is sold to a committed buyer, while buyers can be sure that the item they want will be waiting for them when they arrive to pick it up. This feature encourages sellers to reserve items for shoppers, increasing the availability of items and improving the shopping experience for all users.

At Simpliby, we believe that shopping should be simple and hassle-free. That's why we have worked hard to create an app that is easy to use, secure, and convenient.

Name: Hitba
Description:
Hitba - это онлайн платформа для поиска второй половины в соответствии с канонами шариата. с Hitba вы обретете душевное спокойствие, обретя вторую половину имана. 

Нашей целью является помочь мусульманам желающим вступить в брак, так как 80% мусульман ищут спутника жизни через родственников, знакомых или онлайн. Однако члены семьи многих мусульман не придерживаются религии, а родители не помогают в поисках и знакомство онлайн небезопасно.
Сейчас знакомства происходят в социальных сетях и мессенджерах без гарантии безопасности. В Нашем приложении можно знакомиться с проверенными мусульманами безопасно и по нормам шариата.

Для соблюдения требовании шариата в общении, мы вызываем опекуна девушки (вали) в чат, для наблюдения за общением парня и девушки, тем самым, сохраняя дозволенность данного общения. Если парень и девушка образовали пару, девушка должна поделиться с вали ссылкой на их чат, чтобы начать диалог. Вали заходит в приложение и может предупредить участников чата, либо может остановить чат, выйдя из него


Найди потенциального партнера по жизни с совместимостью по соблюдению религиозных обрядов, возрасту, увлечениям и т.д. Эти данные будут указаны в анкете пользователя, а общие интересы будут выделены.

Name: MyBT LLC.
Description:
MyBT is a Behavior Analyst designed intensive language instruction tool. Parents and professionals can access an extensive developmental curriculum, teach with the precision of an ABA therapist, collect wide-ranging data on student performance, and customize sessions to target specific ABA or IEP objectives. Professionals and caregivers and teachers will increase efficiency, devote more time to natural environment teaching, and continue to systematically cover essential early-learner language milestones and build vocabulary. 

MyBT can be used at home by caregivers, or in schools and clinics by educators and therapists. MyBT contains objectives across 7+ years of language skills, and utilizes typical ABA style teaching methods, including errorless learning, error correction, interspersed and massed trials, and a token economy based reinforcement system. Data collection is automated and users can access a variety of statistics including graphs of individual target performance and overall performance. 

Visit our website www.mybehaviortech.com or contact us here or at info@mybehaviortech.com to learn more!

Automate quiz creation for classrooms, compliance training, or self-study.

Name: Carfinity AutoCare
Description:
Carfinity is a digital autocare and vehicle management platform transforming how car owners in Eswatini and South Africa take care of their vehicles. Our mission is simple: make vehicle maintenance proactive, stress-free, and transparent by giving drivers the tools, reminders, and expert support they need to keep their cars safe, roadworthy, and performing at their best.
Carfinity brings together vehicle owners, mechanics, and service providers into one ecosystem designed for convenience and trust. With our platform, users receive automated maintenance reminders, service plan scheduling, and real-time alerts for oil changes, brake checks, tire rotations, license renewals, insurance expiries, and more. Everything important about your car lives in one place through digital service history, VIN-decoded vehicle details, and accessible maintenance logs.
We also connect drivers to a vetted network of trusted mechanics, offering call-out services, digital bookings, shop profiles with reviews, and transparent pricing. Mechanics gain access to a growing digital customer base and improved visibility.
Carfinity further supports car owners through a parts and services marketplace, offering secondhand and new parts, service packages, and automotive products. Buyers and sellers benefit from vehicle appraisal tools, pre-purchase inspections, damage assessments, and resale value estimators, helping reduce risk and ensure fair pricing.
For businesses and taxi fleets, Carfinity provides tailored fleet maintenance management, bulk service bookings, and digital logs for all vehicles, helping reduce downtime and prolong fleet lifespan.
Our goal is to build a culture of proactive vehicle care in Southern Africa—saving drivers money, preventing breakdowns, and improving road safety. Carfinity is more than a platform; it’s a step toward smarter mobility, trusted mechanics, and empowered vehicle ownership.

Name: Mobile Devices Laboratory
Description:
MDL focuses on scientific research on Web and Mobile Computing, Big Data Management and Multi-Objective Optimisation methods that exploit Cloud technologies for engineering Smart Systems. MDL lays emphasis on Ubiquitous, Mobile and Natural Interaction Devices, including system on chip, sensors and actuators, for the development of smart and cloud-enabled systems. MDL also applies ICT technologies for the design and development of platforms, software tools and mobile applications for solving societal challenges. In specific, it develops smart and personalised ICT-based environments for e-learning, for supporting elders and people with disabilities, for raising awareness and developing counteracting measures against social issues faced by children and migrants, and for health monitoring and support. As part of e-learning MDL personnel has very good experience in development of platforms for Open and Distance Learning and Life Long Learning (OLMEdu – coordinator – Erasmus+, BCT4SMEs – partner – Erasmus+, VALS Erasmus LLP project), as well as the coordination of student mobility actions (3 Erasmus Mundus projects – LEADERS, STRONG-TIES, INTACT).

MDL has established collaborations with several software companies securing various industrial grants, such as the Microsoft Open Government Data Initiative Grant. MDL published more than 20 multi-platform applications, some of which won the local Microsoft Hackathon Competitions in 2012, 2015, the National Microsoft Imagine cup competitions in 2015, 2016, and were ranked in the top-33 in World Online Semi-final and participated in the World Final (Seattle, USA – 2016). MDL consists of modern equipment and deals with a wide range of cutting-edge technologies related to the cloud, web, smart devices, social media, gaming and natural interaction devices. This includes a mobile cloud of 40+ Smartphones and Tablets, cabinet/rack-mounted CISCO routers and switches, a structured internal computer network for pilot testbeds, a number.

Name: My Motorhome
Description:
My Motorhome is the ultimate mobile app designed to revolutionize motorhome ownership and travel. Our mission is to simplify life on the road by providing smart solutions that help motorhome and van owners stay on top of maintenance, streamline costs, and upgrade their vehicles with DIY technology.

We offer a comprehensive platform that caters to all types of motorhome enthusiasts:

Maintenance and Logs: Track your vehicle's upkeep, including fuel costs, repairs, and inspections. With our app, you receive timely reminders for essential tasks like oil changes, road taxes, and technical inspections, so you're never caught off guard.
Smart Modules: Using DIY ESP32 technology, we empower users to turn their motorhomes into smart vehicles, enabling control and monitoring of vital systems such as security, temperature, and lighting.
AI Assistant "Moho": Powered by advanced AI, Moho is your motorhome’s personal assistant, ready to answer questions about travel, maintenance, and technical issues, ensuring you have expert advice at your fingertips.
B2B Solutions: For rental companies, we offer a white-label solution that helps manage motorhome upkeep, increase customer satisfaction, and reduce operational costs.
Designed for a wide range of users, from young adventurers and digital nomads to experienced motorhome travelers, My Motorhome provides the tools needed for hassle-free motorhome management. Whether you’re a seasoned traveler or just starting your van-life journey, we’re here to make sure your motorhome runs smoothly, safely, and intelligently.

With features like expense tracking, route planning, and smart DIY integration, My Motorhome ensures that your vehicle is always road-ready. Join us and transform your motorhome experience today.

Name: MineOrder
Description:
About MinePOS & MinePOP

At Mine Technologies, we believe in transforming everyday transactions into extraordinary experiences. That's why we created MinePOS (Point of Sale) system and MinePOP (Point of Purchase) system -  our flagship mobile applications designed to revolutionize the way businesses and consumers interact.

MinePOS is our innovative point-of-sale app tailored for businesses that wish to simplify operations and enhance customer engagements without the burden of traditional hardware. Whether you're running a restaurant, a spa, or a retail store, MinePOS turns any phone or tablet into a powerful, portable sales terminal. This allows businesses to manage orders, facilitate check-ins, and process payments effortlessly, all from one intuitive interface.

MinePOP offers a seamless point-of-purchase experience for customers. By simply scanning a business' QR code using their smartphones, customers can instantly access a business's products or services, view detailed descriptions, and make secure payments through Stripe. This hassle-free process not only saves time but also enhances the shopping experience, making it smoother and more enjoyable.

Our Vision is to simplify and enhance the commercial interactions between businesses and customers globally, making transactions as quick and easy as a single scan.

Our Promise is to provide a robust, reliable platform that adheres to the highest standards of security and user experience, backed by a dedicated support team ready to assist you in maximizing the benefits of both MinePOS and MinePOP.

Join Us as we redefine commerce with a focus on simplicity, efficiency, and innovation. Discover how MinePOS and MinePOP can elevate your business and delight your customers at Mineorder.com.

 Unsere Leistungen:

 Konzeption & UX: Wir denken mit – und vor allem für die Nutzer:innen.

 Plattformübergreifende App-Entwicklung (iOS & Android)

Wir glauben an funktionale Eleganz, sauberen Code und daran, dass Software echte Probleme lösen sollte. Unsere Stärke liegt in der Kombination aus technischer Kompetenz, klarer Kommunikation und flexibler Projektumsetzung.

Name: Trophium App
Description:
Celebrate Your Trophies. 

Trophium is a mobile platform built specifically for hunters and anglers to document, preserve, and share their outdoor experiences.

We solve a real problem: trophy photos get lost in camera rolls, hunting content gets censored on mainstream social media, and the stories behind great hunts and catches fade over time. 

Trophium provides hunters and anglers with a dedicated platform to capture every detail that matters, species, location, weather, gear, and the story that makes each trophy meaningful.

Features:
- Trophy Documentation: Comprehensive logging with location mapping, weather data, and personal narratives

- Private Camps: Invite-only groups where users share with their trusted hunting and fishing crews

- Trophium Intel: AI-powered expert advice for hunting and fishing questions
Complete Privacy Control: Users decide what stays private and what gets shared publicly

Built by outdoorsmen who understand the culture, Trophium respects hunting and fishing traditions while providing modern tools to preserve outdoor legacies. No censorship. 

No generic social media algorithms. Just a platform designed for the 65 million hunters and anglers in North America who want their stories preserved properly.

Launching January 2026.

Unser Team verbindet Know-How aus den Bereichen Kinder/Jugend/Soziales, Verwaltung und Softwareentwicklung. Das macht uns effizient und wir glauben daran, etwas zu bewegen und verändern zu können.

Name: KesKia - L'appli qui t'dit KesKia !
Description:
Notre histoire

Nous sommes en mai 2019, Romuald et Virgile sont de plus en plus lassés de constater qu'il est plutôt difficile de trouver des informations sur les manifestations autour de chez eux, alors que paradoxalement des annonces sur les réseaux sociaux passent tous les jours.

Dans leur monde idéal, tout le monde devrait trouver facilement quoi faire, où et quand !  Dans leur monde idéal, tous les organisateurs d’évènements devraient avoir un lieu où mettre en avant et communiquer sur ce qu'ils font et proposent pour attirer le plus de monde possible. Mais plutôt que de rêver à ce monde parfait pour les sorties qui n’existe pas vraiment, nous prenons la décision de participer activement à sa création. 

Pour répondre notamment à cette problématique, nous avons décidé de jouer sur un nouveau levier : La consultation gratuite de l’ensemble des évènements organisés dans un secteur et affiner sa recherche par catégorie, distance et préférence.

C’est comme ça que l’application KesKia est née avec pour seul but : faire gagner du temps aux utilisateurs.
 
Notre objectif est simple : « une envie, une recherche, une réponse » !

KesKia a été pensée pour les visiteurs et organisateurs. Mais surtout avec eux. 
En effet, fort d’un travail ciblé, motivé et pertinent, nous sommes allés à la rencontre de dizaines d’organisateurs d’évènements et de visiteurs, ce qui nous a permis de construire une application adaptée à chaque besoin.

Aujourd’hui, KesKia c’est une présence marquée dans le Grand-Est et tend à se développer nationalement. 

C’est pourquoi nous sommes fiers de vous dévoiler la version 2.

Name: Wireless and Sensor Systems Lab - UMass Amherst
Description:
Welcome to WSSLab, a cutting-edge research facility pioneering the future of technology in embedded systems, machine learning, and quantum computing. With a strong foundation in collaboration and innovation, our team of experts is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in an increasingly interconnected world.

Funded by prestigious organizations such as NFS, SONY, and the University of Texas, WSSLab is committed to developing advanced solutions across a range of exciting research areas:

1. Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) - Leveraging the power of connected devices to revolutionize healthcare delivery, diagnostics, and personalized medicine.

2. Wireless Communication - Enhancing the speed, efficiency, and security of data transmission across various platforms and devices.

3. Internet of Living Things - Exploring the potential of bio-inspired and bio-integrated systems to transform industries such as agriculture, environmental monitoring, and biotechnology.

4. Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) - Harnessing the power of machine learning and embedded systems to develop advanced, autonomous drones for various applications, including surveillance, disaster response, and transportation.

5. Quantum Computing - Addressing the challenges of quantum computing by developing innovative techniques to mitigate errors and ensure reliable, high-performance systems.


At WSSLab, we pride ourselves on fostering a collaborative environment that encourages our team to explore new ideas, challenge conventional wisdom, and break down barriers in technology. Join us as we shape the future and redefine the world of computing, connectivity, and beyond.

At RECAN, we’re reimagining how container recycling works — through technology, data, and collaboration.

We build smart software solutions that connect depots, drivers, and customers, making the entire container pickup and refund process simpler, faster, and more transparent.

Our flagship platform, Container Pickup, is Australia’s first B2B SaaS solution purpose-built for the Container Deposit Scheme (CDS) network. It helps depots and recycling operators manage bookings, allocate jobs, track pickups, and gain real-time insights — all in one connected system.

But RECAN’s vision goes beyond technology.

We’re driven by the belief that a circular economy starts with accessibility and efficiency. By empowering depots with digital tools and providing convenience to communities and businesses, we aim to increase container return rates, reduce emissions, and create more opportunities for people-powered recovery.

Headquartered in Brisbane, Queensland, RECAN is proudly Australian, working with partners across the recycling and sustainability sectors.

Let’s work together to turn recycling into opportunity — one container at a time.
 www.recan.co | www.containerpickup.com.au

#Recycling #Sustainability #CircularEconomy #Innovation #TechForGood #ContainersForChange

Name: Carol App
Description:
Carol is a free mobile app that connects and supports modern mums throughout their Motherhood journey through community & hand picked expert-led resources. Reaching over 100,000 UK mums across our digital platforms monthly. If you are a brand that would like to work with us please email press@carol-app.com for access to our Media Pack.

Carol offers a space for mums to connect, build their community, find their 'village', support each other throughout the good and hard times of Motherhood and to understand that they are not alone. 

Users can connect with likeminded mums based on similar interests, children of the same age and living close by, as well as join groups and create their own groups to really build their community. 

Carol also offers free expert led resources from experts within the child and baby space, across Pregnancy, Postpartum, Baby Sleep, Baby Feeding, Baby Development and The Early Years all in one place and for free. The resources part of the app is an encyclopedia of some of the most informative articles across a wide range of Motherhood and Parenting topics, supporting mums as they move through Motherhood, answering the most frequently asked questions. Scrolling through the minefield of the internet trying to find the answers to questions whilst sleep deprived and taking care of your child is hard work to say the least, that’s why we wanted to offer our users the answers all in one place.

Did you know that a staggering 80% of mums admit to feeling lonely? Well, we believe it's time to change that!

We understand the challenges of motherhood and the importance of having a strong support system. That's why we've created Carol—a place where mums can come together, support one another, and know that they are never alone on this incredible journey.

Name: Napoleon
Description:

Napoleon is a time-tracking app that turn distraction into a conscious choice, by letting you put a real financial cost to it.

We believe our discipline is not enough to stop scrolling. 
You should be free to spend your time how you want, but that choice should feel real.

With Napoleon, you take back control of your attention, one minute at a time.

⸻

How it works:
 You set a price per minute for time spent on distracting apps (like Instagram or Twitter).
 If you go over your limit, you pay. No exceptions. Real money.
 You can set a max amount per day you get charged if you scroll 

⸻

We don't block your apps. It’s about accountability on your terms. 

Because time is the most valuable thing you have.
And it’s time we started treating it that way.

Name: Alun App
Description:
Personalized audio for well-being.

Alun is an app that utilizes Indonesian musical sound generated by AI that is personalized to improve well-being and mental health.

Manifesto:
As a society, we are constantly bombarded with noise and stimuli that can overwhelm our senses and leave us feeling exhausted and frazzled. At Alun, we believe that technology can be harnessed to create unique experiences that help individuals find peace, tranquility, and joy through personalized audio experiences.

Our vision is to create a world where people can find peace and serenity in the form of audio. We want to help individuals escape the noise and chaos of the outside world and enter into a peaceful state of mind through our audio experiences.

At Alun, we value authenticity, inclusivity, and sustainability. We believe in creating innovative audio experiences that are tailored to each individual listener while staying true to our values. We use AI technology to provide a soothing soundscape based on the users' preferences, time, weather, and heartbeat (with permission).

Our mission is inspired by Brian Eno’s Ambient Music philosophy. We believe that conventional background music strips away all sense of doubt and uncertainty, while Ambient Music retains these qualities. Ambient Music induces calm and provides a space to think. It must be able to accommodate many levels of listening attention without enforcing one in particular; it must be as ignorable as it is interesting.

In conclusion, at Alun, we strive to create innovative, personalized, and transformative audio experiences that enhance our emotions, increase our productivity, and bring moments of joy, relaxation, and comfort. We believe that technology can be harnessed to create a better world, and we are committed to doing our part to achieve that vision.

Alun [Indonesian] = A wave that extends and rolls, usually smaller than waves, but bigger than ripples (Indonesian Dictionary).

Name: Goal Scaling Solutions, Inc.
Description: Goal Scaling Solutions (GSS) is a method of measuring goal attainment over time, using a five-point scale to capture all possible outcomes for a given goal. GSS is a unique approach to goal setting, one that promotes success along a continuum rather than the traditional all-or-nothing success vs. failure model.  This methodology, beginning with Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS), been used in healthcare and educational settings since 1968. Numerous studies have found GAS to be highly sensitive to change, unlike other measures that use a generic and broad evaluation, not specific to the needs of each individual. The ability to capture small but meaningful change over time makes it a preferred outcome measure among clinicians, researchers, teachers, and caregivers.

Name: Timespex
Description:
Here are 3 good reasons to join Timespex community: 
1. Get practical tips on how to optimize your business processes and maximize the value of your team time.
2. Share your “dead” or “peak” working hours to find talent/businesess interested on working in those time ranges.
3. Find qualified service providers looking to collaborate and do partnerships to increase the revenues.

Are you wondering “Why” do we do this? 
We believe that businesses in the service industry, such as driving schools, wellness & fitness centers and leisure agencies have a great chance of success if their collaborators are strongly motivated and committed to the business. 

The Timespex App is designed to help these businesses achieve the goal of engaging their collaborators by making them business partners, empowering them to decide when to work after-hours and sell directly to potential clients. 

With an innovative approach, Timespex is becoming a community of business owners, freelancers and busy clients who want to maximize the value of their time using the Time-To-Time Model (T2T). Where time is exchanged for the highest price in money or in assets.

On the other side, Timespex helps freelancers to find job opportunities which fit best their expertise and most importantly, share their availability. 

To add on, in Timespex, business owners and freelancers have the opportunity of using dynamic pricing and social media to attract more clients. 

Finally, if you are a busy person, who needs to find high quality services in special times, inside the app, you will be able to find the best offers in terms of schedule and price ranges!

Irmantas Jagminas created Time-To-Time (T2T) a future business model that has been successfully applied in practice and continues to spread and use this model in the field of services.

Name: Tribbum
Description:
A solidarity app to share a home and meet people in the same situation, favoring mutual help. 

It is specially designed for divorced, separated or single mothers/fathers who need to share a home with their children, either periodically or permanently. Also for all types of families, people without children and the elderly (helping to combat loneliness), so that it not only helps to reduce the economic expenses of a home, but also allows synergies to be created according to the various needs and values so that they can help each other if they need it. 

After the pandemic, the prolonged crisis, inflation and salaries that do not rise, the number of families that are at risk of poverty is growing. 

Some people have free time, a time that others do not have and it involves a daily struggle to be able to reconcile work and family life. 

We know that sharing a home when you have children is not an easy task, for this reason Tribbum was born, developing an app that allows you to quickly find people in your same situation, creating a community based on values such as respect, empathy, understanding, support and solidarity.

Description:
The Ridester mobile app helps make rides safer and more fun for motorcycle riders while hitting the road, through it's intercom (live audio room) and live location-sharing feature. Just create a ride, share invite link to ride members, and you're good to go!

INTERCOM (Walkie-talkie / two way radio):
Ridester features high-quality audio, noise-cancellation, and unlimited range for all riders, so you can keep talking to each other at high riding speeds or longer distances apart!

LIVE LOCATION-SHARING:
With Ridester you can share and view the live location of all the riders, ensuring everyone is on track, and no one is lost!

Create a profile: Download and install Ridester app from Appstore and create a rider profile.

Plan a ride: The user (admin in this context) can plan new rides and add members.

Communicate with fellow riders: After setting out on the ride, the members can talk to each to other through the app, listen to instructions, plan pitstops -- all on the go. Users can also choose to mute themselves.

View co-rider location: View live location of co-riders on a map, ensuring
all riders are on the same page, and that nobody gets lost ever again!

Manage a ride: Admins can add or remove riders or make a fellow rider admin while travelling.

Conclude a ride: The app keeps you company, facilitating fool-proof communication among the group of riders, till the admin concludes the ride.

Name: Alimio
Description:
You open the fridge after a long day. The spinach you bought “for healthy lunches” is wilting. Yogurt’s creeping toward its date. A half-onion stares back, accusingly. It’s a tiny moment, but over a year, moments like this add up to about 100+ kg of wasted food per person and hundreds of pounds thrown away in the average UK household. That’s money you worked for, meals you could’ve enjoyed, and a planet that doesn’t need the extra waste.

That’s why we’re building Alimio.

Alimio is the quiet companion in your kitchen, AI that notices before you forget. The day your yogurt is three days from expiring, Alimio gives you a gentle nudge. It doesn’t just warn you; it offers dinner ideas that use what’s running out first: a herby spinach omelette, a zesty yogurt marinade, a quick soup that rescues that half-onion. Missing coriander and one lemon? Alimio generates a tidy grocery list with only what you need. No overbuying. No guesswork.

A week later, the pattern sticks. You cook what you already have, plan in minutes, and shop with purpose. By the end of the month, you’ve saved real money (cutting even a portion of avoidable waste adds up fast), cleared space in your fridge, and felt that subtle lift that comes from being in control. Multiply that across a year and the savings are meaningful, food you paid for becomes meals you love, not landfill.

Less waste, more taste, and money back in your pocket. Join us as we turn good intentions into everyday habits; one timely, tasty meal at a time.

We do this by solving some the more difficult enterprise application challenges for you by building the solution into the platform: security, performance, account management, off-line access to data, cross-platform deployment, authentication, notifications, two-way communications, location services and more.

We then make it easier again by offering pre-built components you can use in your app for data collection, inspections, reading asset tags, timeclocks, activity timers, scheduling, enterprise to-do lists and more.

We offer integrations to common enterprise applications.

We then expose all of this with an intuitive command line app builder that lets you fire simple commands and see you app start to come to life.

If you are a software engineer, we going to save you a lot of time and help you focus your skills on solving the business problem at hand.

If you are an enterprise application analyst that knows a structured command line driven language like SQL, we're going to enable you to build apps.

AppTree is built on Dart, Flutter & Firebase.  Check us out at https://apptreesoftware.com

Name: Invited
Description:
Présentation de Invited App

Organiser un mariage, un anniversaire ou toute autre cérémonie importante demande du temps, de la coordination et une grande attention aux détails. C’est pour répondre à ce besoin que nous avons créé Invited App, une application innovante qui simplifie la planification et la gestion de vos événements, du début jusqu’au jour J.

Invited App permet à chaque utilisateur de créer sa cérémonie en ligne, qu’il s’agisse d’un mariage, d’un anniversaire, d’une fête religieuse ou d’un événement professionnel. En quelques minutes, vous pouvez personnaliser votre événement, ajouter les informations essentielles et inviter vos proches directement depuis l’application.

Les invités reçoivent une invitation numérique personnalisée qu’ils peuvent accepter en un clic. Une fois leur présence confirmée, ils ont la possibilité de télécharger leur invitation en version PDF. Ce document, unique et sécurisé, leur sert de pass d’accès à présenter à l’entrée le jour de la cérémonie.

Grâce à cette approche, l’organisateur n’a plus besoin d’imprimer des centaines d’invitations papier, ce qui permet de réduire considérablement les coûts tout en contribuant à la protection de l’environnement. Invited App s’inscrit ainsi dans une démarche moderne et écoresponsable, adaptée à notre époque.

L’application propose également plusieurs fonctionnalités pratiques : gestion complète de la liste d’invités, suivi des confirmations de présence, partage du programme de l’événement, et envoi de notifications pour informer les invités des mises à jour ou des changements de dernière minute.

Invited App n’est pas seulement un outil d’organisation, c’est une nouvelle manière de célébrer intelligemment. Elle combine simplicité, technologie et durabilité pour offrir une expérience fluide, élégante et respectueuse de l’environnement.

Avec Invited App, organiser un événement devient un plaisir, et chaque moment compte.

Was Qrush besonders macht:
 Eventfinder mit Live-Daten

Unsere Vision:
Eine Nacht, in der niemand alleine bleibt. Ein Event, das du nie verpasst. Ein Nachtleben, das verbindet - digital und real.

FalconSnap is a Construction Management Software (CMS). It serves as a simple CRM (Customer Relationship Management) system  and PMO (Project Management Organizer) specifically designed for construction companies. Here are some key features and functionalities of this software:

1. CRM Functionality: The software acts as a CRM by storing and managing customer information, including contact details, communication history, and project preferences. This allows construction companies to effectively track and manage their relationships with clients.

2. Project Data Management: The CMS allows construction companies to manage data on multiple projects in a centralized and organized manner. It provides a platform to store and track project details such as project scope, timelines, budgets, and milestones.

3. Task Tracking: The software provides a running tab of tasks for each project, allowing construction companies to monitor the progress of various activities and tasks. It enables project managers to assign tasks, set due dates, and track their completion status.

4. Bid Production: The CMS facilitates the production of bids for construction projects. It allows companies to create and manage bid documents, including cost estimates, specifications, and project proposals. This streamlines the bidding process and improves efficiency.

5. Document Management: The software stores important digital documents and files for each project, such as architectural drawings, permits, contracts, and project reports. This ensures easy access to critical project documents and eliminates the need for physical paperwork.

Overall, this construction management software provides construction companies with a comprehensive solution to streamline their operations, improve project management, and enhance customer relationship management. 

Contact FalconSnap today for a free demo!

L'EXPÉRIENCE
Avec First sight app, il te sera possible de voir les autres personnes célibataires, utilisant l'application, se trouvant dans le même lieu public que toi au moment où tu t'y trouves. Comme nous croyons que l'intérêt et les étincelles naissent surtout d'un premier regard, d'une vibe ou de vive voix, nous te faisons traverser l'écran au restaurant, dans un festival, au gym, au parc, ou ailleurs, afin que tu puisses ressentir ce que dégage vraiment une personne. Tout ce que nous faisons est de donner un coup de pouce au hasard, afin de permettre à deux humains de connecter ensemble au même endroit et au même moment. Nous osons dire que First Sight app n'est pas une application de rencontre. Nous créons simplement l'opportunité sociale dans un monde physique et vous vous chargez du reste, car le seul domaine où ça ne devrait pas être virtuel sont les relations humaines.



LA VALEUR SCOIALE
Nos 3 objectifs principaux:
-Des conversations sans écran, alors qu'on parle beaucoup de la santé mentale en lien avec leur utilisation.
-Permettre une alternative au magasinage de profils qui créer une surcharge cognitive.
-Permettre des premières impressions en personne plus susceptibles de mener à un contexte de socialisation.

Name: DedoCar. A new smartphone app to share your car rides to workplace.
Description:
We are creating a new digital ride-sharing platform. It is a second generation of an "Urban Hitchhiking BlablaCar". A smartphone application will make it very easy for millions of people to share their car trips to work daily (they just need to press two buttons at the moment; without any prior search, negotiation and appointment).
It will help you get rid of a lot of problems (parking and traffic jams) and save you up to 75% of your transportation costs.
To share a trip to work, now it is enough to go in the same direction, and you no longer need to be neighbours and colleagues at the same time, because the car can pick up and leave people on the way.
We rely on a patented procedure, which monitors in real time the journey of a vehicle with free seats, locates on the fly passengers who have a route compatible with the driver's one, and intersperses the collection and delivery points of said passengers, automatically calculating the equitable part of travel expenses that corresponds to each one, so that all of them can save up to 75% of what they would spend going each in their own car.
By leveraging more efficiently the vacant capacities of cars moving around the city at rush hour, we hope to remove from circulation many underused cars, which only cause traffic jams, parking problems, and 80% more pollution than normal, in the air we breathe. And probably cause also a climate change.
We hope to reduce up to a million tons of CO2 emissions per year, in every city the size of Madrid.

Name: Rouzan
Description:
Rouzan is a virtual tour guide service provider. Users travel the world through private live video tours. Rouzan connects travelers with local guides in real time to explore any location in the world. Whether you want to explore the indoors of the Shangri-La Resorts or the outdoor scenery of the Moroccan desert. There are no limitations. The traveler enjoys a private tour, while the tour guide makes money. Rouzan tours are video game-like experiences!

1. Who is the viewer?
The viewer, also known as the traveler, is the user requesting the live video tour. The viewer controls the tour and pays the tour guide per minute, or for free!

2. Who is the host?
The host, also known as the tour guide, is the user who receives the call to provide the live video tour. The host receives movement directions requests from the viewer and gets paid per minute.

3. Do I need two accounts?
You only need one account. You can switch between being the viewer or the host. If you call someone, you're the viewer, but if you're receiving the call, you're the host.

4. How do the viewer and the host communicate?
To overcome the language barrier, Rouzan developed a language-agnostic user interface to relay messages between the host and the viewer. It simulates a video game experience.

Streamlined Experience: Post, manage, and promote property listings effortlessly from a single dashboard.

Verified Listings: Ensures authenticity through compliance with RERA guidelines and user verification mechanisms.

Secure Payments: Subscription-based listing model integrated with Razorpay, following RBI-compliant payment standards.

Responsive UI/UX: Adaptive design ensures optimal user experience across all devices and screen sizes.

Our Vision

To democratize real estate marketing by offering an affordable, transparent, and technology-driven platform where every property can reach the right audience — without middlemen, hidden fees, or complexity.

Legal & Compliance

Kyha is an intelligent femtech platform built by women, for women. Our mission is to close the gender health gap by giving women trusted, personalized access to the support, care, and information they deserve, from first period to menopause and beyond.

We’re starting where the need is greatest: perimenopause and menopause. More than 1.3 million women in the US enter menopause each year, yet most feel unsupported, dismissed, or left to piece together advice from Google searches and generic apps. Kyha changes that.

With privacy-first design, inclusive tracking, intelligent AI insights, and expert-reviewed content, we help women navigate midlife health with clarity and confidence. Soon, we’ll expand our Care & Support offering with low-barrier access to specialists through in-app office hours, message boards, and Q&As, building a trusted circle of guidance that goes far beyond symptom tracking.

At our core, we believe women’s health deserves innovation, empathy, and representation. By centering diverse voices and experiences, Kyha is redefining what care looks like, not just as an platform but as a movement to normalize conversations around women’s health.

Our vision: to become the first truly intelligent, adaptive health companion for women across every stage of gynecological health.

Name: rescAIle
Description:
rescAIle is building something quietly radical: a shared second brain that turns emotional labour into collective intelligence and everyday support.

Women still carry most of the invisible work that keeps families running — the remembering, the anticipating, the planning, the countless mental notes held in silence. This cognitive load is real, exhausting, and largely unseen. We exist to change that.

Our mission:
To transform emotional labour into shared intelligence — making the invisible visible and creating fairer, calmer, more balanced daily lives.

Our purpose:
To design technology that cares back. Using AI, behavioural insight, and lived experience, we create equilibrium where there was exhaustion, and shared responsibility where there was imbalance.

What we’re building:
rescAIle is a communal second brain that learns the quiet patterns of daily life: the mental tabs you keep open, the planning behind routines, the decisions that take up headspace. It helps families understand their unique rhythm and lightens the load by sharing the thinking, not just the tasks.

Why it matters:
Emotional labour isn’t personal — it’s systemic. But change doesn’t always require disruption. Sometimes it begins with reflection, clarity, and support that understands the real world. rescAIle is a velvet revolution for family life: gentle, fair, and rooted in the belief that care should be shared.

How we work:
rescAIle is built with women, not just for them — grounded in academic research, behavioural science, community insight, and lived experience. Together, we’re shaping technology that genuinely supports everyday life.

Join us as we create a future where care becomes shared, intelligence becomes collective, and life feels lighter.

Name: TimeGen
Description:
At TimeGen, we believe technology should simplify work, not complicate it. That’s why we’ve built a smart, mobile-first SaaS platform designed for companies with field-based employees in industries such as construction, cleaning, facility services, logistics, and technical services.

Our mission is simple: help businesses save time, prevent fraud, and ensure compliance — all while giving managers complete visibility of their workforce.

 What we offer:
	•	GPS-validated clock-in/out with anti-fraud detection (no more “buddy punching” or GPS spoofing).
	•	AI-powered reporting that improves employee descriptions, corrects errors, and generates clean, professional reports automatically.
	•	Project & task management with photos, notes, and incident logging, directly from the mobile app.
	•	Smart reminders & notifications so employees never forget to clock in/out, and managers catch errors instantly.
	•	HSE/PRL compliance tools, ensuring companies meet safety and legal requirements with digital proof.
	•	Cloud-based access for administrators, with full dashboards and exports to PDF/Excel.

 Whether you manage 10 or 300 employees, TimeGen adapts to your company’s needs, helping leaders:
	•	Reduce wasted admin hours by up to 80%.
	•	Improve accuracy of timesheets and payroll.
	•	Gain transparency across multiple worksites.
	•	Scale effortlessly as teams grow.

Already trusted by companies in construction and cleaning, TimeGen is expanding internationally, bringing Nordic innovation to businesses worldwide.

With TimeGen, you don’t just track time, you take control of your operations.

Name: One Life
Description:
We get one shot at this thing. 
One life.

This isn’t a draft. 
This isn’t a dress rehearsal.
This is it.

Every moment we waste doom scrolling,
binge watching baking shows
and telling ourselves we don’t have enough time
is a moment we could spend living.

Not as the version of us that snacks on content like a squirrel with a drug problem.
The version of us we dreamed we’d be when we were kids.
The version of us who believed - deep in our bones -
that we were meant for something big.

One Life is a jolt to the heart,
A middle finger to mediocrity
A springboard into the depths of our potential.

No toxic hustle culture. 
No weird cult energy. 
No chakra realignment.

Just one tiny, wildly doable action a day.
Small enough to not have any excuses,
Powerful enough to shift your trajectory.
To turn “maybe someday” into right now.
To feel more powerful, 
more fully alive, 
more you.

You tell us what parts of your life you want to light up.
The parts that are flickering.
The parts that are hungry for more.

Then we send you one small challenge every day—
Something you can do in minutes,
but that echoes for hours,
days,
decades.

Try it once.
Or turn it into a rhythm.
Your rhythm.
Your rise.

Because this isn’t about fixing ourselves.
We’re not broken.
We’ve just forgotten who we truly are.

One Life offers reprise for people too tired to “optimize.”
Joy for those who forgot they deserve it.
Motion for the stuck,
Laughter for the lost,
Fire for the ones who still believe something more is possible.

You don’t need to quit your job or join a monastery.
You just need to take one small, brave step towards the life that’s been calling out to you.
And then another.
And another.

Until one day, you wake up to a life that finally feels like yours.

One Life. 
One tiny, soul-sparking action a day.
One less excuse to keep living like a raccoon in a Wi-Fi-enabled dumpster fire.

Join the rebellion at onelifetribe.com

Inicialmente fue concebida para facilitar la búsqueda de espacios adaptados para coworking, pero nuestra visión ahora va mucho más allá.

Nuestra misión es democratizar el acceso a espacios adaptados para coworking y, sobre todo, mitigar la soledad, que creemos será (o ya es) la nueva pandemia causada por las redes sociales. Apostamos por usar la tecnología para volver a conectar a las personas entre sí, deteniendo así el deterioro social y cognitivo, mientras mejoramos la productividad y creatividad. Como resultado, también aumentamos la clientela de las cafeterías, creando un ciclo beneficioso para todos.

Name: AlamApps
Description:
AlamApps is a consumer app studio building for Gen Z India through a house of brands model, with plans to expand globally after achieving product-market fit. 


The company operates three distinct brands under one roof: Sea Games (game studio), Nimlore (story publisher), and the Chakra (wellness app) & the Aura ecosystem of consumer apps—each with its own identity and theme, but all serving Gen Z audiences at different touchpoints. 


Beyond the launcher, AlamApps builds distribution through creator partnerships and influencer-native channels (currently 3 creators in the network), plus growth platforms including YouTube, Instagram, and LinkedIn.  


This personal, authentic approach creates tight integration across apps that feels real rather than forced, allowing each brand to grow through word-of-mouth and shared audiences rather than paid acquisition. 


Design philosophy

The studio's strategy centers on "better but simple design thinking" to drive mass adoption—prioritizing clarity and ease of use to lower barriers for Gen Z users who expect premium experiences without complexity. By operating as a house of brands rather than a branded house, each product can speak to its specific use case while the parent company builds shared capabilities in design, growth, and distribution infrastructure. 


Current stage: Pre-launch, with the distribution ecosystem being built in parallel with the product portfolio.

Name: XVAR
Description:
XVAR est une startup marocaine qui vient de lancer sa première application dédiée à la détection, l’évaluation et la visibilité des jeunes talents du football marocain.
Née d’un constat simple, le talent existe partout mais reste trop souvent invisible. XVAR apporte une réponse concrète aux limites du scouting traditionnel en s’appuyant sur la vidéo, la data et le digital.

Notre plateforme introduit un nouveau modèle de repérage, plus accessible, plus structuré et plus méritocratique, pensé pour connecter joueurs, fans, clubs, recruteurs et institutions au sein d’un même écosystème.

  Pour les joueurs & talents (8–23 ans)

XVAR permet aux jeunes footballeurs de :
- Créer gratuitement leur profil
- Publier leurs vidéos et meilleures actions
- Valoriser leur poste, leur style de jeu et leurs performances
- Être visibles par des clubs, recruteurs et institutions
Ici, chaque action compte. La visibilité ne dépend plus du réseau, mais du contenu et du potentiel.

 Pour les fans de football

XVAR, c’est aussi :
- Un espace dédié aux jeunes talents et à l’actualité NEWS & FAN du football.
- Le suivi des joueurs, des performances et des profils prometteurs
- Une nouvelle manière de découvrir le football marocain de demain

 Pour les recruteurs, clubs & institutions

- La plateforme met à disposition :
- Une base de données de talents structurée
- Des filtres avancés (âge, poste, profil, niveau, vidéos)
- Un outil d’analyse vidéo pour un repérage plus précis et plus efficace
XVAR facilite la prise de décision et fait gagner du temps dans l’identification des bons profils.

 Bien plus qu’une application, XVAR participe à la modernisation du football marocain en digitalisant la détection, en renforçant la transparence et en valorisant le mérite.

 Application 100 % gratuite
 Pensée et développée au Maroc
 La technologie au service du talent

XVAR — Parce que ton talent mérite d’être vu.

Name: 3 Step Chef
Description:
When I learned both my parents had heart disease, I decided to take a different path.

I dove into research and discovered Dr. Greger’s book, How Not to Die. It taught me that everyone starts with clear arteries and our food choices are crucial for keeping them free of blockages.

To avoid heart disease, Dr. Greger recommends swapping artery-clogging foods for heart-healthy alternatives. So I made the change and became confident that my food choices supported my lifelong health.

But planning, shopping for, and cooking heart-healthy meals every week wasn’t easy. The ads on recipe websites were tedious, and making a shopping list was time-consuming.

So I built 3 Step Chef to simplify heart-healthy cooking. Now you can take control of your health and build sustainable, healthy habits through a simple routine: Plan, Shop, Cook, Repeat.

The meals are crafted by Registered Dietitian Nutritionists, ensuring each recipe is packed with both flavor and nutrition. While heart disease is the leading cause of death, we can take action to prevent it.

Download the app and cook your first heart-healthy meal today!

Your heart will thank you.

 Nic

Name: Buuks
Description:
Okuma eylemini, tek kişilik bir aktiviteden çıkarıp, kullanıcıların birbirinden ilham aldığı global, sosyal bir keşif yolculuğuna dönüştürmek. 

Milyonlarca okur, dijital dünyada kitaplarını takip etmek, notlar almak ve yeni keşifler yapmak istiyor. Ancak mevcut pazar, Goodreads gibi hantal, eskiyen ve sosyal etkileşimi zayıf platformların hakimiyetinde. Okurlar için yeni bir kitap keşfetmek, çoğu zaman keyifli bir ilham sürecinden çok, zahmetli bir arama eylemine dönüşmüş durumda. 

Buuks, bu boşluğu doldurmak için doğdu. 

Biz, "veritabanı" gibi hissettiren statik bir arşiv değil, "yaşayan bir sosyal akış" sunan yeni nesil bir mobil platformuz. Rakiplerin aksine, Buuks'un kalbinde dinamik "Takip Edilenler" akışı yer alır. Tıpkı sinemaseverlerin Letterboxd'da yaptığı gibi, kullanıcılarımızın kitap keşfini zahmetsiz ve organik bir ilham kaynağına dönüştürüyoruz. 

Platformumuzun temel taşları; güvendiğiniz arkadaşlarınızın ve takip ettiğiniz küratörlerin ne okuduğunu ana sayfanızda gördüğünüz canlı bir sosyal keşif; sadece arama çubuklarıyla yetinmeyip, kullanıcılarla sohbet ederek kişiselleştirilmiş öneriler sunan yapay zeka destekli bir küratör; ve tüm bunları birleştiren, en başından mobil için tasarlanmış, hızlı ve modern bir arayüzdür. 

Okurlar için modern bir okuma günlüğü ve ilham verici bir topluluk yaratırken; yayınevleri, yazarlar ve paydaşlar için de ("Buuks Insights" ve "Buuks Partner" modellerimizle) bu tutkulu kitleye ulaşmaları için doğal ve etkili bir köprü kuruyoruz. Team Husk tarafından geliştirilen Buuks, 10 Ağustos 2025'ten beri Google Play'de kullanıcılarla buluşuyor. iOS geliştirmelerimiz ve global açılım hazırlıklarımız hızla devam ediyor. 

Okuma serüveninize yeni bir soluk getirmek, bu vizyonun bir parçası olmak veya iş birliği fırsatları için bizimle iletişime geçin.

Name: Succedo
Description:
SUCCEDO — L'app qui guide les étudiants vers la réussite

Aujourd’hui, de nombreux étudiants se sentent dépassés, démotivés ou mal accompagnés face à leurs études. Manque de méthode, procrastination, stress, isolement… Pourtant, la réussite n’est pas une question d’intelligence, mais d’organisation, d’habitudes et de stratégie.

C’est pour répondre à ces défis que j’ai créé SUCCEDO, un projet EdTech ambitieux dont la mission est simple : aider chaque étudiant à apprendre, progresser et réussir grâce à une application pensée pour eux.

Notre solution :
Une app intuitive qui guide les étudiants au quotidien :

Planning intelligent et personnalisé

Rappels motivants & micro-objectifs

Méthodes d’apprentissage actives (flashcards, quiz, répétition espacée…)

Suivi des progrès et feedbacks clairs

Communauté d’entraide et de soutien

Notre ambition :
Devenir la plateforme de référence pour les étudiants francophones, en alliant technologie, science cognitive et accompagnement humain. À terme, SUCCEDO vise à devenir l’application n°1 pour apprendre, étudier et réussir.

Pourquoi maintenant ?
Avec l’explosion des besoins d’accompagnement pédagogique post-Covid, les étudiants sont en quête de repères et de solutions concrètes. Le marché EdTech est en forte croissance et SUCCEDO s’inscrit pleinement dans cette dynamique.

Nos atouts :

Un projet fondé par un étudiant en DCG (Diplôme de Comptabilité et de Gestion), confronté aux réalités du terrain

Une approche centrée utilisateur, construite avec les retours de +500 étudiants interrogés

Une vision claire, structurée et ambitieuse

Actuellement en phase de prototypage, nous recherchons des partenaires, incubateurs, investisseurs et collaborateurs engagés pour accélérer ce projet à fort impact.

 N’hésitez pas à me contacter si vous souhaitez en savoir plus ou contribuer à cette aventure !

Join the ranks of language pioneers and download PidginPal today. Open your heart to new cultures, connect with global communities, and witness the power of communication that knows no bounds. Don't miss this one-of-a-kind opportunity - immerse yourself in West African culture with PidginPal!

The old world of work collapsed.

We call this discipline Career Consciousness Training — the art and science of seeing work as a living system and learning to operate with awareness, intention, and sovereignty.

We don’t teach job hunting.
We train system thinking.
We don’t coach performance.
We cultivate consciousness. The kind that compounds into leverage, influence, and demand.

Every season inside the Fishtape Dojo, high-talent professionals practice the skills the old world never taught:

Seeing the systems behind their success
Debugging drift and distraction
Building artifacts that generate proof and demand
Operating as sovereign creators, not corporate passengers

Fishtape was built for the overqualified, underutilized generation. The ones ready to evolve from performers to operators, from employees to architects of their own systems.

We believe AI won’t replace people, it will expose who’s been operating unconsciously.
The future belongs to the aware: those who train their perception, sharpen their proof, and design their own path through the new world of work.

This is the dojo.

Where Awareness Becomes Advantage.

Name: Chant Social Inc.
Description: Sufism, Rumi teachings, Buddhism, and Vedic teachings are among the fastest-growing doctrines in the world. Their sacred chants (dhikrs) are some of the easiest and most straightforward ways to reprogram the subconscious mind. The challenge lies in creating a habit that allows you to do it thousands of times daily. We found a simple and social way for people to complete their chants. Over 200 million people worldwide chant thousands of times a day. This behavior is deeply ingrained in their cultures and beliefs. It has been scientifically proven by Berkeley and Stanford Universities that chants have a significant impact on our awareness. However, the current way people chant is technologically outdated. It's often done manually, using prayer beads or finger counters. It also doesn't allow for social ways to do group (or live) chants. We enable people from all over the world to come together and engage in live/group chants. Additionally, using artificial intelligence and an extensive data pool, our generated content helps users find chants (dhikrs) that best fit their moods.

Name: Fotovea
Description:
Fotovea is a photo contest community for photo lovers and growing photographers, built to turn the audience’s voice into meaningful, quality human feedback. Everything happens through contests designed as friendly comparisons, not a race for likes. Behind the scenes, many subjective votes are aggregated through sophisticated math into a crowd-powered ranking (wisdom of the crowd) that reflects what consistently resonates.

For photographers, contests capture human feedback at scale: images that resonate with the audience advance to later rounds and place higher in the rankings. Repeated results across contests create a stable signal of how each photo performs with people. As your craft improves, your newer photos tend to resonate more, and you can track that progress through your portfolio score over time.

For voters, contests are a way to discover great photography, compare different interpretations of the same topic, and sharpen your eye while voting. Your votes help photographers improve, and you can earn rewards for the time you spend engaging, turning idle time into side income.

We offer a new vision of stress monitoring in the health market because processing more types of biosignals with the help of Artificial Intelligence using mathematical and statistical models. Also, we can precisely measure the stress levels and can enter the user into the application of ways to reduce the level of stress.

Dibble removes that friction.

Dibble is a SaaS-based procurement and operations marketplace that gives small and large contractors full control over what happens on site, in real time.

Name: SnapSpeak
Description:
SnapSpeak is a mobile app designed to capture, extract, and summarize text from images—instantly and intelligently.
Here’s how it works:
Snap a Picture – Users take a photo of a document, whiteboard, handwritten notes, printed page, or any image containing text.
Text is Extracted – The app uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition) to pull text from the image.
Smart Summarization – That text is then processed by AI to generate a clear, concise summary.
Voice Playback (Optional) – Users can choose to hear the summary read aloud in a natural voice.
Export & Share – Summaries can be copied, saved, or shared to other apps.
Who It's For:
Students capturing class notes or textbook pages
Professionals reviewing documents, meeting notes, or whiteboards
Anyone who needs fast, AI-powered understanding of visual text
Why It’s Different:
Combines image capture, OCR, AI summarization, and text-to-speech in one streamlined app
No need to type, scan, or copy-paste long paragraphs
Helps users process information faster and on the go

So verschwinden alte Gruppen aus deinem Chat, aber die Erinnerungen bleiben.

Vor zwei Jahren haben wir während des Studiums mit der Entwicklung unserer Idee begonnen. Geprägt durch die Corona-Krise, die Freunde von einander getrennt hat, möchten wir die App kostenlos zur Verfügung stellen. Wir wollen es möglichst einfach machen, sich mit Freunden wieder zu treffen und gemeinsame Erinnerungen zu schaffen.

Name: Green Inc
Description:
Green Inc. es una empresa tecnológica especializada en desarrollar ecosistemas físicos-digitales que transforman la forma en que las marcas interactúan con sus audiencias. Combinamos innovación, diseño y estrategia para conectar espacios físicos con experiencias digitales medibles, relevantes y de alto valor.

Nuestro portafolio incluye:

GreenLink: Plataforma SaaS para centralizar tu identidad digital profesional y de marca.
GreenTag: Chips inteligentes que convierten objetos físicos en herramientas interactivas sin contacto.
Conexión Smart: Dispositivos personalizados que activan acciones digitales desde puntos físicos estratégicos.
OmniBox: Solución integral para eventos, puntos de venta y activaciones que combinan marketing físico y digital.
Ciudades Digitales: Iniciativa para modernizar la infraestructura urbana mediante herramientas accesibles, eficientes y centradas en el ciudadano.
En Green Inc. no solo desarrollamos productos, creamos soluciones escalables que impulsan la eficiencia, la visibilidad y la innovación de empresas, instituciones y gobiernos. Nuestra tecnología está pensada para ser sostenible, medible y adaptable a cualquier industria.

 Conecta con el futuro. Transforma tu presencia. Piensa en verde.
 www.greentag.work

Name: Unicule
Description:
We know that humans are social beings. Every growth of a human is related to his social opportunities. Society, on the other hand, is a source of endless opportunities. But due to some cognitive inadequacies, there are many situations where many opportunities go unnoticed as they pass forward.

The market has already adopted new forms, expressions and tastes, transcending all local, national and international boundaries. Name: Kook Food
Description:
Kook is meant for YOU... yes, for YOU!

For You, who loves cooking and You are good at it. It´s all nice but You would like to share Your cookings with others ... and what´s even better ... this is Your chance to make money with Your cooking skills and also save the world. Let´s stop wasting food together!

It´s very simple … You sit on Your couch and look from the app what are Your neighbours been preparing today. You find the food that You like, You buy it for a very good price and go pick it up. As all the cooks are living very close by, there should be only few minutes to walk to get Your breakfast, lunch or dinner
You pick the food up, eat it and enjoy life. But don´t forget … by using the app and eating what´s offered in Your neighbourhood, You also help stop wasting food and saving the planet. 

Thank You for that!
